1000623690.english: And in his ears again there was an earring.
1000623690.korean: 그리고 그분의 귀에는 다시 귀걸이가 걸려 있었습니다.

1000623691.english: - The missing puzzle pieces came together. The sparkling earrings and strange behavior from Cerestia's ears.
1000623691.korean: - 비어있던 퍼즐 조각이 맞춰졌다. 세레스티아의 귀에서 반짝이던 귀걸이와 이상행동.

1000623692.korean: 그것이 아마... 그 수상한 로봇이 아닐까 싶습니다.

1000623693.english: I saw something called the "New Human Project" in that lab.
1000623693.korean: 그 연구실에서 "신인류 프로젝트" 라는 걸 봤어.

1000623694.english: - As far as I know, there is only one person who is interested in the new humanity.
1000623694.korean: - 내가 아는 범위 내에서, 새로운 인류에 관심이 있는 것은 단 한 명 뿐이다.

1000623695.english: - Lemonade uses the suspicious robot to brainwash the elf villagers and use them as research material to resurrect their leader.
1000623695.korean: - 레모네이드가 그 수상한 로봇을 시켜 엘프 마을 주민들을 세뇌하고 자신들의 수장을 부활시키기 위한 연구의 재료로 삼는다.

1000623696.english: - Snow Feather and Sunny escape and fight to stop it.
1000623696.korean: - 스노우 페더와 써니는 탈출해 그것을 막기 위해 싸우고 있다.

1000623697.english: - And that robot finds me and tries to capture me...
1000623697.korean: - 그리고 그 로봇은 나를 발견하고 확보하려 한다...

1000623698.english: - As I got up, the team members also got ready again.
1000623698.korean: - 내가 몸을 일으키자 대원들도 다시 채비를 갖췄다.

1000623700.english: Leave it to me. I'll make sure the Commander returns safely to the other children.
1000623700.korean: 맡겨줘. 꼭 사령관을 무사히 다른 애들 품으로 돌아가게 해줄-

1000623701.english: - Everyone froze at the roar heard before Elven, who didn't lose his playfulness even in this situation, could finish speaking.
1000623701.korean: - 이런 상황에서도 장난스러움을 잃지 않는 엘븐의 말이 끝나기도 전에 들려온 포효에 모두가 얼어붙었다.

1000623703.english: Hey, are there any Tyrants left?!
1000623703.korean: 서, 설마 남아있는 타이런트가 있는 거야?!

1000623704.english: This way! Let's go deeper into the forest!

1000623705.english: Then that guy won't be able to move easily either!
1000623705.korean: 그러면 저녀석도 쉽게 움직이진 못 할 거야!

1000623706.english: - I barely managed to break through the encirclement and ran blindly in the opposite direction of the roar.
1000623706.korean: - 가까스로 포위를 뚫어내며 무작정 포효가 들려오는 반대 방향으로 달렸다.

1000623707.english: - But in the forest, menacing mechanical noises, ground rumbling, and intermittent roars continue to follow us.
1000623707.korean: - 하지만 숲 속에서는 위협적인 기계소리와 땅울림, 간헐적인 포효가 계속해서 우리를 따라온다.

1000623710.english: - He kept running, holding onto Vanilla as she tripped over a tree root and fell.
1000623710.korean: - 나무 뿌리에 걸려 넘어지려는 바닐라를 붙잡아주며 계속 달렸다.

1000623711.english: - No matter how much I run, the forest doesn't seem to end.
1000623711.korean: - 아무리 달려도 숲은 끝날 것 같지 않다.

1000623713.english: Commander, we're still going around the same place.
1000623713.korean: 사령관. 우리 계속 같은 곳을 돌고 있어.

1000623714.english: I'm sure. I saw that tree earlier.
1000623714.korean: 확실해. 저 나무, 아까 본 거야.

1000623715.english: The Dark Elven pointed to a peculiarly curved tree. Certainly... it was memorable.
1000623715.korean: - 다크엘븐이 특이하게 휜 나무를 가르켰다. 확실히... 기억에 남아 있다.

1000623716.english: Judging by the enemy's actions so far, that seems right.
1000623716.korean: 지금까지 적의 행동을 보면 그게 맞는 것 같아.

1000623717.english: They do put up a fight, but when a full-scale engagement starts, they retreat before they suffer any major damage, right?
1000623717.korean: 싸움을 걸긴 하지만, 본격적인 교전이 시작되면 큰 피해를 입기 전에 퇴각하잖아?

1000623718.english: In addition, if you head west, that is, towards the port, there will be strong resistance and you will be forced to change direction.
1000623718.korean: 거기다 서쪽, 그러니까 항구가 있는 쪽으로 방향을 잡으면 그때는 강하게 저항해서 방향을 돌리게 만들고 있어.

1000623719.english: He's stupid when he fights, but his movements are well controlled...
1000623719.korean: 싸울 때는 멍청한데, 이런 움직임은 제대로 통제되고 있어...

1000623720.english: Probably somewhere between the village and... the place where the resistance kids live.
1000623720.korean: 아마 마을이랑... 그, 레지스탕스 애들이 지내는 곳의 중간 어딘가일거야.

1000623721.english: I'm not sure because it's just a feeling...

1000623722.english: - There are two main ways to overcome a siege situation.
1000623722.korean: - 포위 상황을 극복하는 방법은 크게 두 가지다.

1000623723.english: - Concentrate your firepower and break through in one direction, or hold out and wait for support.
1000623723.korean: - 화력을 집중해 한 방향을 돌파하거나, 버티며 지원을 기다리거나.

1000623724.english: - But now, if we try to break through, our firepower is insufficient.
1000623724.korean: - 하지만 지금은 돌파하자니 아군의 화력이 부족하고,

1000623725.english: - However, it is unclear whether reinforcements will arrive, so we cannot hold out.
1000623725.korean: - 그렇다고 버티기엔 지원군의 도착 여부가 불투명하다.

1000623726.english: - It is impossible to deal with Tyrant with the firepower that is insufficient to break through these AGSs now.
1000623726.korean: - 지금 이 AGS들을 돌파하는데에도 부족한 화력으로 타이런트를 상대하는 것은 불가능하다.

1000623728.english: Huh? Then I'll get caught by that monster!

1000623730.english: - He continued speaking, looking at Harpyia who seemed to have noticed before he spoke.
1000623730.korean: - 말하기 전에 눈치챈듯한 하르페이아를 바라보며 말을 이었다.

1000623733.english: The water pressure is weak, so I can't use water. I'll fight with gear.
1000623733.korean: 수압이 약해져서 물은 못쓰겠는걸? 난 기어로 싸울게.

1000623734.english: The beam machine gun output is still more than half, and the missiles haven't been fired at all.
1000623734.korean: 빔머신건 출력 아직 반 이상이고, 미사일은 한 발도 안 썼어.

1000623735.english: Yeah. I saved it just like the Commander said, but I guess that's a good thing...
1000623735.korean: 응. 사령관 말대로 아껴놨는데, 다행이라고 해야할지는...

1000623736.english: I am always ready to sacrifice my worthless life for you, Master.
1000623736.korean: 소첩은 언제든지 주인님을 위해 이 보잘것 없는 목숨을 바칠 준비가 되어있습니다.

1000623739.english: If we stay behind, we can buy you some time to evacuate, Master.
1000623739.korean: 저희가 남으면 주인님이 대피하실 시간 정도는 벌 수 있습니다.

1000623740.english: On top of that, there is also the possibility that the pursuers might lose track of the Master due to the battle...
1000623740.korean: 거기에 전투 때문에 추격자들이 주인님의 흔적을 놓칠 가능성도...

1000623743.english: The moment I was about to give an order, white wings wrapped around me.
1000623743.korean: - 지시를 내리려는 순간 하얀 날개가 나를 감쌌다.

1000623745.english: As Snow Feather held me and hid her body among the lush tree trunks, I felt the strangeness I had felt before, and the space before my eyes distorted slightly.
1000623745.korean: - 스노우 페더가 나를 안고 무성한 나무 줄기 사이에 몸을 숨기자 예전에 느꼈던 이질감이 느껴지고, 눈 앞의 공간이 살짝 일그러졌다.

1000623747.english: The other members also followed Sunny and hid themselves. Soon, a hologram projecting our images appeared and headed in the direction we were going.
1000623747.korean: - 다른 대원들도 써니를 따라 몸을 숨겼다. 곧, 우리의 모습을 투영한 홀로그램이 생겨나 우리가 가던 방향으로 향했다.

1000623750.english: The rumbling of the earth heard from afar grew closer, and soon the tyrant appeared, knocking down trees.
1000623750.korean: - 멀리서 들리던 땅울림이 가까워지고, 곧 나무를 쓰러뜨리며 폭군이 모습을 드러냈다.

1000623752.english: Snow Feather's arms tightened as she hugged me.
1000623752.korean: - 나를 끌어안은 스노우 페더의 팔에 힘이 들어갔다.

1000623753.english: After a few seconds that felt like an eternity, fortunately, the Tyrant passed by where we were hiding.
1000623753.korean: - 영원처럼 느껴지는 몇 초가 지나고, 다행히도 타이런트는 우리가 숨어있는 곳을 지나쳐갔다.

1000623757.english: No, it is not. It is our duty to serve you, Human.
1000623757.korean: 아니에요. 인간님을 위해 봉사하는 건 저희의 의무니까요.

1000623759.english: If you mean as a thank you for saving me last time...?
1000623759.korean: 저번에 구해주신 것에 대한 보답, 이라면요...?

1000623761.english: Snow Feather, who had been whispering and talking for a moment, looked around.
1000623761.korean: - 작게 속삭이며 잠시 이야기를 나누던 스노우 페더가 주위를 둘러보았다.

1000623762.english: think it's okay to go down now.

1000623763.english: Ah, I'll get it down for you...

1000623764.english: - I came down from the tree with the help of Snow Feather.
1000623764.korean: - 스노우 페더의 도움을 받아 나무에서 내려왔다.

1000623765.english: Yes. I have snowy owl genes mixed in.

1000623767.english: I refused Snow Feather's help and stepped onto the ground by stepping on the tree trunks.
1000623767.korean: - 스노우 페더의 도움을 거절하고 적당히 나무 줄기를 밟으며 땅으로 내려왔다.

1000623769.english: As I reached out my hand from where the squad members and Sunny had disappeared, my arm vanished in the air along with a sensation I had felt before.
1000623769.korean: - 대원들과 써니의 모습이 사라졌던 곳에서 손을 뻗자 한 번 느껴보았던 감각과 함께 허공에서 팔이 사라졌다.

1000623770.english: As I stepped inside, Sunny and the members sitting close together greeted me.
1000623770.korean: - 안으로 들어서자 옹기종기 둘러앉은 대원들과 써니가 맞아주었다.

1000623771.english: Hello. Hehe, it's really nice to see you again.

1000623772.english: Yes. The gentleman fixed it in no time.

1000623773.english: Just in case, I'd like to ask, but is that gentleman's name Alfred?
1000623773.korean: 혹시나 해서 묻겠습니다만, 그 아저씨란 분의 이름이 알프레드입니까?

1000623776.english: We told Snow Feather and Sunny what we had inferred based on the information we had.
1000623776.korean: - 우리가 가진 정보를 바탕으로 추론해낸 것을 스노우 페더와 써니에게 말해주었다.

1000623777.english: Or maybe all of this, including you guys, is just a play.
1000623777.korean: 아니면 당신들까지 포함해 이 모든게 연극일수도 있죠.

1000623778.english: Oh, no! It's true that my sisters and I were brainwashed, but the fact that you're a bad person...
1000623778.korean: 아, 아니에요! 그, 저희 자매들이 세뇌당한 건 맞는데, 아저씨가 나쁜 분인건...

1000623779.english: The man is helping us. That can't be true.
1000623779.korean: 아저씨는 저희를 도와주고 계세요. 그럴리 없어요.

1000623780.english: And we also... have absolutely no intention of harming you or you, Human.
1000623780.korean: 그리고 저희도... 여러분과 인간님을 해코지하려는 생각은 결코 없어요.

1000623781.english: Well, I just said it for now. Your methods are too cumbersome to call you part of the same gang.
1000623781.korean: 뭐, 일단 말해본 겁니다. 당신들도 한패라기엔 방식이 너무 번거롭습니다.

1000623783.english: As Vanilla said, Snow Feather and Sunny have let too many opportunities slip away for them to be considered brainwashed.
1000623783.korean: - 바닐라의 말대로, 스노우 페더와 써니 또한 세뇌당한 상태라기엔 그냥 흘려보낸 기회가 너무나 많다.

1000623784.english: I looked at Snow Feather, agreeing with Vanilla's opinion.
1000623784.korean: - 바닐라의 의견에 동의하며 스노우 페더를 보았다.

1000623785.english: I agree with Vanilla's point of view to some extent, but given the circumstances, I decided to make a clear decision.
1000623785.korean: - 바닐라의 생각에 어느정도 동의하기는 하지만, 상황이 상황인 만큼 확실히 하기로 했다.

1000623787.english: decided to trust Snow Feather and Sunny in their unwavering eyes looking at me.
1000623787.korean: - 나를 바라보는 흔들림 없는 눈동자에 스노우 페더와 써니를 믿기로 했다.

1000623788.english: - Snow Feather's face darkened as he told me about how he was attacked by AGS that appeared out of nowhere and how Cerestia, who was talking to him, suddenly grabbed her head and cried out in pain.
1000623788.korean: - 어디선가 나타난 AGS들에게 공격받은 것과 나와 대화하던 세레스티아가 갑자기 머리를 부여잡고 고통스러워 했던 이야기를 해주자 스노우 페더의 얼굴이 어두워졌다.

1000623790.english: We are fighting against the fairy village.
1000623790.korean: 저희는 요정 마을에 대항해 싸우고 있어요.

1000623791.english: But that's to save the villagers.
1000623791.korean: 하지만 그건 마을 분들을 구하기 위해서에요.

1000623792.english: As Feather mentioned last time, we were saved by our leader and moved our base to this island.
1000623792.korean: 저번에 페더가 말씀드린 것처럼 저희는 리더에게 구해지고 이 섬으로 거점을 옮겼어요.

1000623793.english: At first, everything seemed fine. All I had to worry about was the few Metal Parasites on the island and the AGS to the north. And we had plenty of supplies.
1000623793.korean: 처음엔 다 잘 될 것 같았어요. 섬에 있는 약간의 철충들과 섬 북쪽의 AGS들만 신경쓰면 평화로웠거든요. 물자도 많았구요.

1000623794.english: But one day, a Bioroid came to town.
1000623794.korean: 그런데 어느날, 어떤 바이오로이드가 마을에 찾아왔어요.

1000623796.english: - Even while exchanging glances with the agents, Snow Feather continued speaking.
1000623796.korean: - 대원들과 눈빛을 교환하는 동안에도 스노우 페더는 계속 말을 이어갔다.

1000623797.english: That Bioroid was looking for something. But...
1000623797.korean: 그 바이오로이드는 무언가를 찾고 있었어요. 그런데...

1000623800.english: - Instead of Snow Feather, who continued speaking in a trembling voice as if she were about to cry at any moment, Sunny interrupted with an awkward smile.
1000623800.korean: - 당장이라도 울 것 처럼 떨리는 목소리로 말을 잇는 스노우 페더 대신, 써니가 난처한듯 웃으며 끼어들었다.

1000623801.english: Ahaha, sorry. Feather was having a bit of a hard time talking about that...
1000623801.korean: 아하하, 죄송해요. 페더가 그 얘기를 하는 걸 조금 힘들어해서...

1000623802.english: To cut to the chase, the Bioroid found the A.I. it was looking for in the north of the island.
1000623802.korean: 결과만 말씀드리면, 그 바이오로이드는 섬 북쪽에서 찾고 있던 A.I.를 발견했어요.

1000623803.english: The name... was said to be named after a certain scientist...
1000623803.korean: 이름이... 어떤 과학자의 이름을 따온 거라고 했었는데...

1000623806.english: It is said that even after the destruction of the humans, Robert continued to carry out orders.
1000623806.korean: 인간님들이 멸망한 뒤에도 로버트는 계속해서 명령을 수행하고 있었다고 해요.

1000623807.english: But then a Bioroid suddenly appeared and hacked Robert, forcing him to do whatever he wanted...
1000623807.korean: 그런데 돌연히 나타난 바이오로이드가 로버트를 해킹해서 뜻대로 움직이게 한 뒤에...

1000623808.english: They brainwashed and experimented on our sisters with special devices.
1000623808.korean: 저희 자매들을 특수한 장치로 세뇌하고 실험을 했어요.

1000623810.english: I found the lab before the AGS chased me.

1000623811.english: I haven't found out the details though.

1000623812.english: You guys are really amazing... You and I worked so hard to figure that out...
1000623812.korean: 여러분은 정말 대단하시네요... 저희랑 아저씨가 그걸 알아내려고 얼마나 고생을 했는데...

1000623813.english: The golden orchid over there has great sense.

1000623814.english: I found it while chasing after the villagers who were being dragged away.

1000623815.english: Oh, over there... did you happen to see the person being dragged away...?
1000623815.korean: 아, 저기... 혹시 그 끌려가시던 분을 보셨나요...?

1000623816.english: Yeah. I thought it was strange because he was clearly screaming when he was being dragged away, but when he came out, he looked like normal.
1000623816.korean: 응. 분명히 끌려갈때는 비명을 지르고 있었는데 나올때는 평소같은 모습이라 이상하다고 생각했어.

1000623818.english: It didn't feel like I was being punished or experimented on.
1000623818.korean: 벌을 받거나 실험을 당한 것 같지는 않았어.

1000623820.english: The old man said the experiment wasn't going on for a while. But I was still hoping...
1000623820.korean: 아저씨가 얼마 전부터 실험은 진행되지 않는다고 하셨거든요. 그래도 혹시나 했는데...

1000623821.english: - In response to my question, Sunny took something out of her pocket.
1000623821.korean: - 내 물음에 써니는 주머니에서 무언가를 꺼냇다.

1000623824.english: Yes. It was a plan to get Feather's attention and for me to steal the earrings.
1000623824.korean: 네. 페더가 시선을 끌고 제가 이 귀걸이를 훔치는 작전이었어요.

1000623825.english: This is a device to brainwash our sisters.

1000623826.english: This was absolutely necessary for the plan, but if I stole it, I didn't know what would happen to my sister who lost her earrings...
1000623826.korean: 계획에는 이게 반드시 필요했지만, 이걸 훔친다면 귀걸이를 잃어버린 자매에게 무슨 일이 일어날지 몰라서...

1000623827.english: When I saw that lab... if the experiments had continued, something terrible might have happened.
1000623827.korean: 그 실험실을 봤을 땐... 만약 계속 실험이 이어졌다면 심한 일을 당했을지도 몰라.

1000623828.english: That's right. That's why I haven't been able to carry out my plan for a while.
1000623828.korean: 맞아요. 그래서 그동안 계획을 실행하지 못하고 있었어요.

1000623829.english: No matter how much I told myself that things would be okay, I only had negative thoughts.
1000623829.korean: 아무리 잘 될거라고 되뇌여봐도 나쁜 생각만 들었거든요.

1000623830.english: So now I can't back down. This is a chance that's finally here.
1000623830.korean: 그러니까 이젠 물러설 수 없어요. 간신히 찾아온 기회에요.

1000623832.english: You said that controlling us with those earrings means that you can hack the main body in reverse through that route.
1000623832.korean: 그 귀걸이로 저희를 조종한다는 건, 그 루트를 통해 역으로 본체를 해킹할 수 있다는 뜻이라고 하셨어요.

1000623833.english: Yes. It's unknown whether we can neutralize the main body, but at least we can de-brainwash it...
1000623833.korean: 네. 본체를 무력화할 수 있을지는 미지수지만 적어도 세뇌를 풀 수는 있을거라고...

1000623834.english: It makes sense. Remotely controlling a Bioroid from outside isn't an ordinary thing.
1000623834.korean: 일리가 있어. 바이오로이드를 외부에서 원격으로 조종한다는 건 보통 일이 아냐.

1000623835.english: So this earring will be deeply connected to the body.
1000623835.korean: 그만큼 이 귀걸이는 본체에 깊게 연결되어 있을거야.

1000623836.english: Embed the code into this earring and upload it to Robert's body.
1000623836.korean: 이 귀걸이에 코드를 심고 로버트 본체에 업로드하는 거예요.

1000623838.english: So I didn't want to involve humans.

1000623841.english: Then I will guide you- Ah!

1000623842.english: - AGS were seen searching the surroundings outside the swaying hologram curtain.
1000623842.korean: - 일렁이는 홀로그램 막 바깥으로 주변을 수색하는 AGS들의 모습이 보였다.

1000623843.english: Commander, what are you going to do?

1000623844.english: - He looked around at the soldiers preparing for battle and called out to Snow Feather and Sunny.
1000623844.korean: - 전투를 준비하는 대원들을 둘러보며 스노우 페더와 써니를 불렀다.

1000623846.english: It's not that far, but it will take some time as it goes through the old town and the forest.
1000623846.korean: 그렇게 멀지는 않지만 구 시가지와 숲을 거쳐야 해서 시간이 걸릴 거예요.

1000623849.english: - After dealing with the search party in the vicinity, I used Sunny's hologram once again to throw out the bait.
1000623849.korean: - 주변에 있는 수색대를 처리한 후 다시 한번 써니의 홀로그램을 이용해 미끼를 던졌다.

1000623850.english: - It's uncertain whether I'll experience it again after experiencing it once, but it's better than not doing it at all.
1000623850.korean: - 한 번 당한 것에 또 당할지는 미지수지만, 안하는 것보단 도움이 되겠지.

1000623851.english: Rather, it might be a way to take them by surprise.
1000623851.korean: 오히려 허를 찌르는 방법이 될 수도 있을 거야.

1000623852.english: It would be difficult to imagine that a weak enemy that is surrounding you would move towards your own base instead of towards your own forces.
1000623852.korean: 포위하고 있는 약한 적이 아군 방향이 아니라 자신의 본진쪽으로 이동할 거라고는 생각하기 어려울테니까.

1000623853.english: - We headed north, shaking off the other search parties.
1000623853.korean: - 다른 수색대를 따돌리고 우린 북쪽으로 방향을 잡았다.

1000623854.english: - Unlike the port area where there were layers of siege nets, as Harpyia had said, this area was closer to a deserted area.
1000623854.korean: - 하르페이아의 말처럼 겹겹이 포위망이 쌓여있던 항구 방향과는 달리, 이쪽은 무주공산에 가까웠다.

1000623855.english: Excuse me. We were supposed to meet here...

1000623856.english: - And now we are waiting for that robot named Alfred near the old town.
1000623856.korean: - 그리고 지금 우린 구 시가지 근처에서 그 알프레드라는 로봇을 기다리고 있는 중이다.

1000623858.english: I never knew that it was true that there were children waiting for me.
1000623858.korean: 자기를 기다리는 아이들이 있다는게 진짜였을줄은 몰랐습니다.

1000623859.english: Yeah... I thought I was just saying whatever came to mind...
1000623859.korean: 네... 저도 그냥 되는대로 하는 말인줄로만...

1000623860.english: ...It would be faster if you see it for yourself.

1000623861.english: - I felt a little uneasy seeing Vanilla's teeth shaking.
1000623861.korean: - 치를 떠는 바닐라의 모습에 약간 불안해졌다.

1000623863.english: About five feet, to the torso...

1000623865.english: After some time had passed, the robot we had been waiting for finally appeared.
1000623865.korean: - 얼마나 시간이 지났을까, 마침내 기다리던 로봇이 모습을 드러냈다.

1000623867.english: Oh my, so there are gentlemen here too! Nice to meet you, I am Mr. Alfred-
1000623867.korean: 어이쿠, 신사분도 계셨군요! 반갑습니다, 저는 Mr 알프레드라고-

1000623870.english: Ha, haha... Hello! It's nice to see you again...?

1000623871.english: They managed to escape, leaving behind nothing but a scrap metal frame.
1000623871.korean: 용케 도망쳤더군요. 고철 프레임만 남겨두고 말입니다.

1000623872.english: Kuhuhu, my true body is this very core! I have plenty of replacement bodies!
1000623872.korean: 쿠후후, 제 본체는 바로 이 코어입니다! 대신할 몸은 얼마든지 있지요!

1000623874.english: Oh, Miss Snow Feather! I couldn't be happier to see you safe and sound!
1000623874.korean: 오오, 스노우 페더 양! 무사한 걸 보니 더할 나위 없이 기쁩니다!

1000623875.english: I heard briefly from Sunny earlier that the plan went well?
1000623875.korean: 아까 써니 양에게 잠깐 들었는데, 계획은 잘 됐다구요?

1000623876.english: Yes. The earrings were retrieved, and the person who had them taken is safe.
1000623876.korean: 네. 귀걸이도 얻었고, 귀걸이를 빼앗기신 분도 무사하세요.

1000623877.english: A human here rescued me when I was captured.

1000623879.english: Alfred quickly turned his head toward me.

1000623880.english: Oho... So you are the Master that Miss Vanilla was talking about!
1000623880.korean: 오호... 바닐라 양이 말씀하셨던 주인님이라는 분이시군요!

1000623881.english: Thank you so much for saving Miss Snow Feather!
1000623881.korean: 스노우 페더 양을 구해주셔서 정말로 감사합니다!

1000623882.english: Alfred, who had bowed his head gracefully to me, subtly extended his hand.
1000623882.korean: - 내게 멋들어지게 고개를 숙인 알프레드가 슬쩍 손을 내밀었다.

1000623883.english: If it's not too much trouble, could I have just a single strand of your hair?
1000623883.korean: 실례가 안된다면, 머리카락 한 올만 받을 수-

1000623886.english: Ah, sir, you're very interested in biological genes...
1000623886.korean: 아, 아저씨는 생물의 유전자에 관심이 많으셔서요...

1000623887.english: Alfred jumped up when Vanilla and I looked at him suspiciously.
1000623887.korean: - 나와 바닐라가 의심스러운 눈으로 보자 알프레드는 펄쩍 뛰었다.

1000623889.english: I haven't said anything yet, though.

1000623890.english: I can tell just by looking at the situation! You must suspect that I am the mastermind behind that crazy AI...!
1000623890.korean: 그정도야 상황을 보면 압니다! 분명 제가 저 돌아버린 A.I.의 배후가 아닐까 의심하시는 거겠지요...!

1000623897.english: If it weren't for you, we wouldn't have been able to make it this far.
1000623897.korean: 아저씨가 아니었다면 저흰 여기까지 오지도 못했을 거예요.

1000623898.english: That is correct! Please believe me!

1000623900.english: Alfred, who had revived in an instant, immediately began to launch into an explanation.
1000623900.korean: - 순식간에 부활한 알프레드는 이내 설명을 늘어놓기 시작했다.

1000623901.english: I don't know how much you've heard, but I am that crazy AI Robert's experimental creation. You could say I'm a kind of prototype!
1000623901.korean: 어디까지 들으셨는지 모르겠지만, 저는 저 미친 A.I. 로버트의 실험작입니다. 일종의 프로토 타입이라고 할 수 있겠지요!

1000623902.english: Didn't you say it was a failure last time?

1000623903.english: Ugh, words make a huge difference! Calling me a failure would be a massive blow to my precious self...!
1000623903.korean: 크윽, 말이란게 아 다르고 어 다르지 않습니까! 실패작이라고 하면 제 소중한 자아에 너무나 큰 타격이...!

1000623904.english: It is worth a try, but...

1000623905.english: There is no need for you to go out of your way to get involved, Master.

1000623906.english: Hiiik...! Please do not touch my beautiful body!
1000623906.korean: 흐이이익...! 제 아름다운 몸에 손대지 말아주시지요!

1000623907.english: H-hmm... Anyway, since Robert and I are AI of the same lineage, we can infiltrate without any problems as long as we secure a path!
1000623907.korean: 흐, 흠흠... 어쨌든, 로버트와 저는 같은 계통의 A.I.이기 때문에 경로만 확보된다면 문제없이 침투할 수 있습니다!

1000623908.english: And our Miss Snow Feather and Miss Sunny succeeded in securing it!
1000623908.korean: 그리고 그것은 우리 스노우 페더양과 써니 양이 확보하는데에 성공!

1000623909.english: Now, all I have to do is plant the code in it and plug it into Robert's main body, and that's it!
1000623909.korean: 이제 그것에 제가 코드를 심고, 로버트의 본체에 꽂아넣기만 하면 다 끝나는 겁니다!

1000623910.english: Sunny, who had been observing my conversation with Alfred with an anxious look in response to my question, stepped forward.
1000623910.korean: - 내 질문에 불안한 눈빛으로 알프레드와 내 대화를 관찰하던 써니가 나섰다.

1000623911.english: I couldn't enter the laboratory, but there were AGS units stationed nearby.
1000623911.korean: 연구실 내부로 진입할 순 없었지만, 근처에 상주하는 AGS들이 있었어요.

1000623912.english: Yes. And as for that AGS called Tyrant... aside from the one chasing you, Human, there must be at least one more.
1000623912.korean: 네. 그리고 그 타이런트라는 AGS는... 인간님을 쫓던 것을 제외하고도 최소 한 대는 더 있을거예요.

1000623913.english: You don't need to worry too much about that!

1000623914.english: Because the Tyrant Robert is commanding right now is terribly weak compared to before the apocalypse!
1000623914.korean: 지금 로버트가 부리는 타이런트는 멸망 전에 비하면 형편없이 약하니까요!

1000623916.english: Of course, the power of the machine itself remains the same, but the interior is the problem.
1000623916.korean: 물론 기체 자체의 강력함은 그대로입니다만, 내부가 문제입니다.

1000623917.english: Alfred tapped his core with his mechanical hand.
1000623917.korean: - 알프레드는 기계손으로 자신의 코어를 톡톡 쳤다.

1000623918.english: No matter how good the hardware performance is, doesn't the software need to support it?
1000623918.korean: 아무리 하드웨어가 성능이 좋아도 소프트웨어가 받쳐줘야하지 않겠습니까?

1000623919.english: Since Robert, who was in control, went insane, something must have gone wrong, because the Tyrants here are literally no different from beasts!
1000623919.korean: 통제권을 갖고 있던 로버트가 미쳐버리면서 뭔가 문제가 생겼는지, 이곳의 타이런트들은 말 그대로 짐승이나 다름없지요!

1000623920.english: It is easy to be fooled with just a simple trick!

1000623921.english: Miss Sunny, wasn't that the case?

1000623922.english: Ah, yes! I followed my hologram without any suspicion.
1000623922.korean: 아, 네! 별 의심없이 제 홀로그램을 쫓아갔어요.

1000623923.english: On top of that, Robert himself isn't anything special!

1000623924.english: It consists entirely of a massive core and mass-produced mechanical arms. As long as you hold off the subordinate AGSs while I hack, there won't be any problems!
1000623924.korean: 거대한 코어와 양산형 기계팔이 전부입니다. 제가 해킹을 하는 동안 부하 AGS들만 막아주신다면 아무 문제 없을겁니다!

1000623925.english: Unfortunately, that is not the case.

1000623926.english: Even for me, it is difficult to neutralize such a powerful AI with just a few lines of code. However!
1000623926.korean: 아무리 저라도 코드 몇줄로 그런 강력한 A.I.를 무력화하는 것은 어렵습니다. 단!

1000623927.english: I can tell you that the residents' brainwashing can definitely be undone.
1000623927.korean: 주민들의 세뇌는 반드시 풀 수 있다고 말씀드릴 수 있습니다.

1000623928.english: Then! Snow Feather and Miss Sunny will come to our aid, and then we can leisurely dismantle that uselessly hard core!
1000623928.korean: 그러면! 스노우 페더와 써니 양의 자매 분들이 지원을 올 것이고, 그 다음에 쓸데없이 단단하기만 한 그 코어를 느긋하게 해체하면 되지요!

1000623929.english: Alright then, shall we set off? Now that I have the help of a human, Kuhuhu... success is bound to come!
1000623929.korean: 자아, 그럼 출발해 볼까요! 인간님의 조력도 얻었으니, 쿠후후... 성공할 수밖에 없을 겁니다!

1000623932.english: Master, what are you going to do...?

1000623933.english: I don't want to gamble with my master's safety.
1000623933.korean: 저는 주인님의 안위를 걸고 도박을 하고 싶지는 않습니다.

1000623935.english: - If we head towards the main body, Robert will naturally turn his troops against us.
1000623935.korean: - 우리가 본체로 향할 경우 자연히 로버트는 병력을 우리에게 돌릴 것이다.

1000623936.english: - Then, the Orca troops engaged in combat will also have some leeway.
1000623936.korean: - 그러면 교전중인 오르카 병력들에게도 여유가 생기겠지.

1000623937.english: Even if communications are still down, we'll be able to determine our location through enemy movements...
1000623937.korean: - 통신이 여전히 먹통이더라도 적의 움직임을 통해 우리의 위치를 파악할 수 있을테고...

1000623939.english: KeumRan. Don't leave your master's side.

1000623941.english: - Alfred, Snow Feather, and Sunny headed north, following their guidance.
1000623941.korean: - 알프레드와 스노우 페더, 써니의 안내를 따라 북쪽으로 방향을 잡았다.

1000623942.english: - Perhaps it was because of the hidden virtue, but for a while I couldn't meet any enemies at all.
1000623942.korean: - 숨어 있던 덕도 있었는지, 한동안은 전혀 적을 만날 수 없었다.

1000623943.english: - But at some point, the number of enemies blocking our path began to increase.
1000623943.korean: - 하지만 어느 시점부터 우리 앞을 막아서는 적들이 늘어나고 있다.

1000623944.english: Pass through this old town and through the forest and you've arrived!
1000623944.korean: 이 구 시가지를 지나 숲을 통과하면 도착입니다!

1000623945.english: Hey, I'll be back for a minute!

1000623946.english: Ah... This is where the old man mostly stays.
1000623946.korean: 아... 여기는 아저씨가 주로 지내시는 곳이거든요.

1000623947.english: Yes. There are no supplies or anything left here... but it seems different to you, sir.
1000623947.korean: 네. 물자 같은 것도 여기엔 남아있지 않지만... 아저씨가 보기엔 다른가봐요.

1000623948.english: Wow, there was something like this!

1000623949.english: Ugh, what have I been doing for decades...!
1000623949.korean: 크윽, 수십 년 동안 저는 대체 무엇을 한 것인지...!

1000623950.english: ...He would collect scrap metal like that and make all sorts of things out of it.
1000623950.korean: ...저렇게 고철 같은 걸 모으셔서 이것저것 만들어주시곤 하셨어요.

1000623955.english: - Snow Feather flew and enveloped me.
1000623955.korean: - 스노우 페더가 몸을 날려 나를 감쌌다.

1000623956.english: - The aftershock of the explosion swept over me behind the white wings.
1000623956.korean: - 하얀 날개 뒤로 폭발의 후폭풍이 나를 덮쳤다.

1000623960.english: - A dark shadow appeared between the collapsed buildings.
1000623960.korean: - 무너진 건물 사이에서 어두컴컴한 그림자가 모습을 드러냈다.

1000623962.english: Human... the answer to my experiment...

1000623963.english: Be quiet... Be the last piece of my experiment...!
1000623963.korean: 얌전히... 내 실험의 마지막 조각이 되어라...!

1000623965.english: - Snow Feather hugged me and distanced himself again, avoiding the explosion.
1000623965.korean: - 스노우 페더는 폭발을 피해 나를 안고 다시 거리를 벌렸다.

1000623966.english: - Through the white wings of the snow feathers that surrounded me, I could see the agents blocking the bizarre robot.
1000623966.korean: - 나를 감싼 스노우 페더의 하얀 날개 사이로 기괴한 로봇을 가로막는 대원들의 모습이 보였다.

1000623968.english: What a waste of time I've wasted because of you guys...!

1000623970.english: This guy is a bit strong. Are you okay?

1000623974.english: - An ominous sound was heard from between the buildings, accompanied by a sinister muttering.
1000623974.korean: - 음산한 중얼거림과 함께 건물들 틈에서 불길한 소리가 들렸다.

1000623975.english: - A voice like Robert's flowed from the various AGS that appeared one by one through the dust.
1000623975.korean: - 먼지를 헤치고 하나씩 나타난 다종다양한 AGS들에게서 로버트와 같은 음성이 흘러나왔다.

1000623976.english: In the face of ultimate evolution...

1000623979.english: - As soon as Robert finished speaking, the AGS's weapons opened fire.
1000623979.korean: - 로버트의 말이 끝나는 것과 동시에 AGS들의 무기가 불을 뿜었다.

1000623980.english: I'll cover you, so take me to the rear first! We're too close to the front lines!
1000623980.korean: 엄호할테니 주인님부터 후방으로 데려가세요! 전선과 너무 가깝습니다!

1000623982.english: - Snow Feather, who was about to fly up while holding me, crouched down, holding my side.
1000623982.korean: - 나를 안고 날아오르려던 스노우 페더가 옆구리를 잡으며 몸을 웅크렸다.

1000623983.english: - The pure white clothes turned red between my fingers.
1000623983.korean: - 손가락 사이로 새하얀 옷이 붉게 물들었다.

1000623985.english: You must escape quickly. Only when you, human, live can we...
1000623985.korean: 어서 피하셔야 해요. 인간님이 사셔야 저희도...

1000623987.english: - He gave instructions to the agents holding out against the advancing AGS and headed into the half-collapsed building behind them.
1000623987.korean: - 밀려드는 AGS들을 상대로 버티는 대원들에게 지시를 내리며 뒤쪽의 반쯤 무너진 건물 안으로 향했다.

1000623990.english: - As Snow Feather spread her wings and went out, Alfred rolled into the building.
1000623990.korean: - 날개를 전개한 스노우 페더가 밖으로 나가는 것과 동시에 알프레드가 구르듯이 건물로 들어왔다.

1000623996.english: - An explosion occurred on the outer wall, causing the building to shake as if it were going to collapse.
1000623996.korean: - 외벽에서 폭발이 일어나 건물이 무너질듯 흔들렸다.

1000623997.english: - I heard the sound of an engine flying towards me.
1000623997.korean: - 급히 이쪽으로 날아오는 엔진 소리가 들렸다.

1000624000.english: Oh, this can't be happening...! This is ridiculous!
1000624000.korean: 이, 이럴 수가...! 이건 말도 안됩니다!

1000624001.english: I just realized that! I never thought you could transform yourself like that!
1000624001.korean: 저도 처음 알았습니다! 저렇게 스스로를 개조했을줄은...!

1000624002.english: - The thin wire made by the hidden agents looked like it could be breached at any moment.
1000624002.korean: - 엄폐한 대원들이 만든 얇은 전선은 당장이라도 뚫릴 것 같이 위태로웠다.

1000624003.english: - Although Harpyia was flying around to provide support, it didn't seem to be effective against the enemy's restraint.
1000624003.korean: - 하르페이아가 날아다니며 지원을 해주고는 있지만, 적들의 견제에 그것도 여의치 않아보였다.

1000624004.english: It's impossible to do it remotely without physical contact...! Didn't I tell you that Robert was a failure?
1000624004.korean: 물리적인 접촉 없이 원격으로는 무리입니다...! 저는 로버트의 실패작이라고 말씀드리지 않았습니까!

1000624005.english: - It is clearly unexpected that the main body would come forward directly, and with such powerful fighting power.
1000624005.korean: - 본체가 직접, 그것도 강력한 전투력을 지니고 나서는 것은 명백히 예상 밖이다.

1000624006.english: - While he was giving orders to his men, trying to figure out a way to hold out a little longer, Snow Feather flew into the middle of the battlefield.
1000624006.korean: - 조금이라도 더 버티기 위한 방법을 짜내며 대원들에게 명령을 내리는 중에 스노우 페더가 전장 한가운데로 날아올랐다.

1000624008.english: - As Elven and KeumRan, who were fighting at the forefront, flew backwards, a cold storm erupted from Snow Feather's wings.
1000624008.korean: - 최전방에서 싸우던 엘븐과 금란이 뒤쪽으로 몸을 날림과 동시에 스노우 페더의 날개에서 냉기폭풍이 터져나왔다.

1000624009.english: - All the AGSs caught up in it were instantly frozen.
1000624009.korean: - 그것에 휩쓸린 AGS들이 순식간에 전부 얼어붙었다.

1000624012.english: - I came down to the building I was in and hugged the collapsing Snow Feather.
1000624012.korean: - 내가 있는 건물로 내려와 쓰러지는 스노우 페더를 품에 안았다.

1000624013.english: Miss Snow Feather! Hey, are you alright?!

1000624015.english: Mr, Human! Please do something quickly! I can't lay a hand on it!
1000624015.korean: 이, 인간님! 빨리 어떻게 좀 해주시지요! 저는 손을 못 댄단 말입니다!

1000624018.english: - I hurriedly looked at the battlefield and saw that a crack was forming in one of the particularly large ice statues.
1000624018.korean: - 급히 전장을 보니 유독 커다란 얼음 조각상 중 하나에 균열이 생기고 있었다.

1000624021.english: The ice shattered and crumbled, and Robert walked out looking perfectly fine.
1000624021.korean: - 얼음이 깨어져 무너져 내리고, 멀쩡한 모습의 로버트가 걸어 나왔다.

1000624023.english: - More AGS units appeared on the frozen battlefield than before.
1000624023.korean: - 얼어붙은 전장으로 조금 전보다 더 많은 수의 AGS들이 나타났다.

1000624024.english: While racking my brains to come up with the most likely way to survive, one part of the AGS formation exploded.
1000624024.korean: - 가장 생존 가능성이 높은 방법을 짜내기 위해 머리를 쥐어짜던 도중, AGS 대열의 한 곳이 터져나갔다.

1000624025.english: As the ensuing shelling exploded upon the other AGSs, a path leading out of the city center opened.
1000624025.korean: - 이어지는 포격이 다른 AGS들에게 작렬하자 도심지 밖으로 향하는 길이 열렸다.

1000624030.english: The support that arrived at the moment of crisis was decisive.

1000624031.english: - They escaped by exploiting the gap where the surprise AGS units' lines had collapsed, and were able to easily defeat the pursuing forces with the help of reinforcements.
1000624031.korean: - 기습당한 AGS들의 전열이 무너진 곳을 파고들어 탈출하고, 추격대도 지원군의 도움을 받아 쉽게 물리칠 수 있었다.

1000624032.english: Are you disappointed because it's not the main unit?

1000624033.english: It was an Armored Maiden that greeted us after we broke through the AGS's encirclement.
1000624033.korean: - AGS들의 포위망을 돌파한 우리를 맞아준 건 아머드 메이든이었다.

1000624034.english: - While we were retreating, the Armored Maidens literally unleashed tremendous firepower, causing the enemies to lose their will to pursue.
1000624034.korean: - 우리가 후퇴하는 동안, 아머드 메이든은 말 그대로 엄청난 화력을 퍼부어 적들의 추격 의지를 상실시켰다.

1000624035.english: I almost got into serious trouble.

1000624037.english: Normally, I would have asked for an award, but I don't think now is the time for that.
1000624037.korean: 평소 같았으면 상이라도 달라고 했을텐데, 지금은 그런 때가 아닌 것 같지 말임다.

1000624038.english: The Bloody Panther frowned slightly after hearing my story.
1000624038.korean: - 내 이야기를 들은 블러디 팬서가 인상을 살짝 찌푸렸다.

1000624040.english: I suppose every unit is trying to secure the Commander's safety first... but we were able to break through the encirclement because it was us; the other units wouldn't stand a chance.
1000624040.korean: 모든 부대가 사령관님의 안전부터 확보하려 하고 있겠지만... 저희라서 포위망을 뚫고 왔지, 다른 부대들은 어림도 없을거지 말임다.

1000624041.english: And I was lucky, too. I just blindly pushed my way into the sound of battle, and ended up meeting the commander.
1000624041.korean: 그리고 운도 좋았어. 무작정 전투 소리가 들리는 곳으로 뚫고 들어왔는데 사령관을 만난 거니까.

1000624042.english: By the way, what was that scary-looking AGS earlier?
1000624042.korean: 그런데 아까 그 무섭게 생긴 AGS는 뭐야?

1000624043.english: He seemed like the leader, so I kept him in check while the others were pouring out attacks...
1000624043.korean: 그게 대장 같아서 다른 애들이 퍼붓는 동안 나는 그걸 마크하긴 했는데...

1000624045.english: It’s a huge relief. With our current strength, we wouldn’t stand a chance against that monster.
1000624045.korean: 천만 다행이지 말임다. 그 괴물 상대로 지금 이 전력으론 택도 없습니다.

1000624046.english: While I was talking to the Armored Maiden, Vanilla and Sunny, who were nursing Snow Feather, approached.
1000624046.korean: - 아머드 메이든과 이야기하는 도중 스노우 페더를 간호하고 있던 바닐라와 써니가 다가왔다.

1000624047.english: treated it with an emergency kit for now.

1000624048.english: He lost so much blood that he hasn't regained consciousness yet...
1000624048.korean: 피를 너무 많이 흘려서 아직 의식을 못 찾고 있어...

1000624049.english: If you're looking for medicine, it's here.

1000624050.english: And I brought plenty of ammunition, too.

1000624052.english: Captain... I see you in a new light...

1000624053.english: As Spriggan put down the ammo box he had brought, a clattering sound rang out.
1000624053.korean: - 스프리건이 가져온 탄약 상자를 내려놓자 절그럭 소리가 울렸다.

1000624054.english: I told you I would need it.

1000624055.english: There are various types. We can all use them.
1000624055.korean: 종류별로 있군요. 저희 모두 쓸 수 있겠습니다.

1000624056.english: Then I will treat Miss Snow Feather.
1000624056.korean: 그럼 전 스노우 페더 양을 치료하겠습니다.

1000624057.english: Commander, I did a good job, didn't I?

1000624058.english: Haha. Then are you going to give me a prize?

1000624059.english: Well, that would be after we've safely escorted the Commander to the Orca, though.
1000624059.korean: 뭐, 일단 사령관님을 멀쩡히 오르카로 모신 다음의 일이겠지만 말임다.

1000624060.english: Before I could even answer, the Elven and Dark Elven who had gone out to scout the area returned.
1000624060.korean: - 내가 대답하기도 전에 주위를 정찰하러 나간 엘븐과 다크엘븐이 돌아왔다.

1000624061.english: It won't last long, but I think I've managed to shake them off for now.
1000624061.korean: 얼마 가진 않겠지만 일단 따돌린 것 같아.

1000624065.english: Excuse me... Can I ask you a favor...?

1000624066.english: Snow Feather is not in a position to move right now.
1000624066.korean: 스노우 페더는 지금 움직일 상태가 아니에요.

1000624067.english: So... it might be dangerous, but can't we rest here for a bit and then leave?
1000624067.korean: 그래서 그... 위험하겠지만, 조금만 여기서 쉬다가 출발하면 안될까요?

1000624068.english: I'll disguise myself as a hologram and set up a guard...

1000624069.english: - There's also the option of hiding Snow Feather and Sunny and going alone...
1000624069.korean: - 스노우 페더와 써니를 숨겨주고 우리끼리 간다는 방법도 있지만...

1000624070.english: - If we do that, Alfred, who is currently fidgeting next to Snow Feather and getting on Vanilla's nerves, will definitely refuse to go with us.
1000624070.korean: - 그렇게 한다면 지금 스노우 페더의 곁에서 안절부절하며 바닐라의 신경을 긁는 알프레드가 함께 가지 않겠다고 할 것이 분명하다.

1000624072.english: Then I'll go to work right away!

1000624073.english: Hmm... I guess we should go together?
1000624073.korean: 으음... 아무래도 이거 우리도 같이 가야할 분위기지?

1000624075.english: We're still energetic, so take a rest.

1000624079.english: Commander, you should rest too. You've been fighting all day, haven't you?
1000624079.korean: 사령관님도 쉬십쇼. 하루종일 전투하신 거 아닙니까?

1000624080.english: Then, if there is anything unusual, I will report it immediately.

1000624081.english: I'll fill in the empty spot. You two, just do what you're doing.
1000624081.korean: 이오 빈자리는 내가 메꾼다. 둘은 하던 대로 해.

1000624082.english: After sending off the Armored Maiden, I slumped down and leaned my back against a tree.
1000624082.korean: - 아머드 메이든을 보내고 털썩 주저앉아 나무에 등을 기댔다.

1000624083.english: The Elven and Dark Elven also approached me and leaned their heads against me from both sides.
1000624083.korean: - 엘븐과 다크엘븐도 내게 다가와 양쪽에서 각자 머리를 기댔다.

1000624084.english: Wouldn't you be better off getting some sleep?
1000624084.korean: 당신, 눈 좀 붙이는게 낫지 않아?

1000624085.english: If anything happens while you're fast asleep, we'll run to your aid, so get a good night's sleep.
1000624085.korean: 골아떨어졌을 때 무슨 일 생기면 우리가 들고 뛸테니까 푹 자.

1000624086.english: Perhaps because the tension had finally released, no answer came out of my mouth.
1000624086.korean: - 긴장이 풀려서인지 대답이 입 밖으로 나오지 않았다.

1000624087.english: I slowly drifted into a light sleep while listening to the sound of the Bloody Panther's armor plates deploying.
1000624087.korean: - 블러디 팬서의 장갑판이 전개되는 소리를 들으며 천천히 얕은 잠 속으로 빠져들었다.

1000624090.english: I was just thinking it would be nice to have someone to have tea with, so this works out perfectly.
1000624090.korean: 마침 차를 같이 마실 사람이 있었으면~ 하고 생각하고 있었는데 잘 됐네요.

1000624095.english: Hmm... your expression looks like you have no idea what this tastes like~?
1000624095.korean: 음... 표정은 이게 대체 무슨 맛인지 모르겠다는 표정인데요~?

1000624098.english: I know you all come here to talk to me, even if the tea isn't good.
1000624098.korean: 차는 맛 없어도 저랑 이야기하고 싶어서 찾아온다는 건 다 아니까요~

1000624100.english: Hehe. What kind of story would you like to hear today?
1000624100.korean: 후훗. 오늘은 어떤 이야기를 듣고 싶나요~?

1000624101.english: I mean the story about the humans you told last time!

1000624102.english: Hey, Leader, have you ever dated humans?
1000624102.korean: 저, 리더는 인간님들이랑 연애 해보신 적 있나요?

1000624103.english: Haha, that's a shame, but I've never had one.

1000624105.english: However, the Leader has been alive since the time when humans existed...
1000624105.korean: 그렇지만 리더는 인간님들이 계실 때부터 살아오셨다고...

1000624106.english: Hmm... should I say I was unlucky?

1000624107.english: My other sisters were often called away for commercial shoots and events... but I stayed on set the whole time.
1000624107.korean: 다른 자매들은 광고 촬영이다, 행사다 해서 자주 불려다녔는데... 저는 줄곧 현장에만 있었거든요.

1000624108.english: Were you not at the scene, Human?

1000624109.english: There were a few people there due to management duties, but they couldn't come close to me because of their low rank.
1000624109.korean: 관리때문에 몇 분 계시기는 했지만, 직책이 낮으셔서 저한테 가까이 오실 수가 없었어요.

1000624112.english: Hehe, to me, they all look like kids who need care, not like potential romantic partners.
1000624112.korean: 후후, 저에겐 다 보살핌이 필요한 아이처럼 보이지, 연애 대상으론 보이지 않아서요.

1000624116.english: Our Feder has hair as beautiful as his heart~
1000624116.korean: 우리 페더는 마음씨 만큼이나 머릿결이 곱네요~

1000624117.english: If he had met a good master, he would surely have been loved.
1000624117.korean: 좋은 주인님을 만났다면 분명히 사랑받았을 거예요.

1000624118.english: It's such a shame. I've never met you, Human...
1000624118.korean: 정말 아쉬워요. 저는 한 번도 인간님을 만나본 적이 없는데...

1000624119.english: Who knows? Maybe a very kind human will suddenly fall from the sky and take in our Feather.
1000624119.korean: 혹시 모르죠~ 갑자기 하늘에서 아주 착한 인간님 한 분이 떨어져서 우리 페더를 거둬주실지도요~?

1000624120.english: If Feather were to get a master, what kind of person would you like them to be?
1000624120.korean: 만약에 페더에게 주인님이 생긴다면, 어떤 분이었으면 좋겠어요?

1000624121.english: I... you are kind, and you pat my head a lot...

1000624122.english: I wish you were the kind of person who would always give me a hug when I sleep.
1000624122.korean: 잘 때는 꼭 안아주시는... 그런 분이었으면 좋겠어요.

1000624123.english: I stroke your head a lot too, you know?

1000624126.english: Oh my, look how late it's already.

1000624127.english: Feather was in charge of securing supplies today, right? Is he going with Sunny?
1000624127.korean: 오늘은 페더가 물자 확보 담당이었죠? 써니랑 같이 가나요?

1000624128.english: Yes. There's nothing useful in the city center anymore, so I'm going to look for a hidden warehouse.
1000624128.korean: 네. 이제 시가지에는 쓸만한 게 없어서 숨겨진 창고를 찾아보려구요.

1000624129.english: Hmm... Feather has good eyesight, so I won't tell him to come back before sunset.
1000624129.korean: 음... 페더는 눈이 좋으니까 해지기 전에 돌아오라는 말은 안 할게요.

1000624130.english: Well then, have a safe trip!

1000624133.english: After taking a nap for about 10 minutes, I woke up to find that Snow Feather had also regained consciousness.
1000624133.korean: - 10분 정도 선잠을 자고 일어나보니 스노우 페더도 의식이 돌아와 있었다.

1000624134.english: While the other members were preparing to move, I heard Snow Feather's story about the past that I hadn't been able to hear completely last time.
1000624134.korean: - 다른 대원들이 이동할 준비를 하는 사이, 스노우 페더에게 저번에 다 못들었던 과거의 이야기를 들었다.

1000624135.english: I liked drinking tea while talking with the leader.
1000624135.korean: 저는 리더와 이야기하며 차를 마시는 걸 좋아했어요.

1000624136.english: The humans the leader told me about, the other bioroids...
1000624136.korean: 리더가 들려주던 인간님들의 모습, 다른 바이오로이드 분들의 모습...

1000624137.english: Whenever I heard things like that, I imagined what it would be like if I had a master.
1000624137.korean: 그런걸 들을 때마다 제게 주인님이 생긴다면, 하고 상상했어요.

1000624138.english: Hehe, that's right. I was really surprised when you suddenly appeared in front of me while I was locked up in prison.
1000624138.korean: 후훗, 맞아요. 인간님이 감옥에 갇힌 제 앞에 갑자기 나타나셨을 땐 정말 깜짝 놀랐어요.

1000624140.english: Snow Feather gently stroked the bandaged wound and smiled faintly.
1000624140.korean: - 스노우 페더는 붕대가 감긴 상처를 조심스럽게 쓰다듬으며 작게 미소지었다.

1000624143.english: Oh, I'm sorry. Were you in the middle of a conversation?

1000624148.english: Could it be that that strange robot tricked us...?
1000624148.korean: 설마 그 이상한 로봇이 우릴 속인 건가...?

1000624149.english: I shouldn't have just given you my hair... It feels a bit off...

1000624150.english: Hehe, I didn't know Sunny would say something like that.
1000624150.korean: 후후, 써니가 그런 말을 할 줄은 몰랐어.

1000624151.english: I'm finally exploring the forest instead of the city, but look at this...
1000624151.korean: 드디어 시가지 말고 숲 속을 탐색하는건데 이모양이잖아...

1000624152.english: All my positive energy has faded away...

1000624156.english: Oh my, to meet a bioroid in a place like this?

1000624158.english: I haven't seen this person before. By any chance...

1000624159.english: That's right. I came from the mainland. I need to find something.
1000624159.korean: 맞아요. 육지에서 왔어요. 조금 찾을 게 있어서요.

1000624160.english: You are the people from that famous fairy village, aren't you?
1000624160.korean: 여러분은 그 유명한 요정 마을 분들이시죠?

1000624162.english: Of course. It's very famous among the surviving bioroids.
1000624162.korean: 그럼요. 생존한 바이오로이드들 사이에서 아주 유명하죠.

1000624163.english: In particular, the reputation of Cerestia, who leads the village, is renowned.
1000624163.korean: 특히 그 마을을 이끌고 있는 세레스티아님의 명성이 자자해요.

1000624165.english: As expected, the leader was a great person...!

1000624166.english: Excuse me, if it's alright, would you like to stop by our village? I'll show you around to see our leader.
1000624166.korean: 저기, 괜찮으시면 저희 마을에 들러보실래요? 리더도 뵙게 해드릴게요.

1000624167.english: I'm honored. But before that, didn't I just say I came here looking for something?
1000624167.korean: 저야 영광이죠. 하지만 그 전에, 제가 방금 뭔가 찾으러 왔다고 했잖아요?

1000624168.english: Have you ever seen AGS on this island?
1000624168.korean: 혹시 이 섬에서 AGS들을 보신 적 있나요?

1000624169.english: Oh, yes! It's on the north side of the island.

1000624170.english: They say it's been there since we came to this island.
1000624170.korean: 저희가 이 섬에 올 때부터 있었다고 해요.

1000624171.english: It looks like something is guarding a large door... I don't know the details.
1000624171.korean: 뭔가 커다란 문을 지키고 있는 것 같은데... 저는 자세히 몰라요.

1000624174.english: No, I'm glad I found what I've been looking for for so long.
1000624174.korean: 아니에요. 오랫동안 찾던 걸 발견해서 기쁘네요.

1000624175.english: Thank you so much. It was a great help.

1000624177.english: Then I'll show you around. It's not that far.
1000624177.korean: 그러면 제가 안내해드릴게요. 그렇게 멀지 않아요.

1000624178.english: It can't be that much of a nuisance.

1000624179.english: Oh, but could you just tell me the location of the fairy village?
1000624179.korean: 아, 대신 요정 마을 위치만 좀 알려주시겠어요?

1000624180.english: I'll come and see you after I finish my business.

1000624182.english: Thank you so much for your help. Then I'll go first.
1000624182.korean: 정말 큰 신세를 졌네요. 그럼 저는 먼저 가 볼게요.

1000624186.english: No... That person had a really cold expression on their face a little while ago.
1000624186.korean: 아니... 저 분, 조금 전에 엄청 냉혹한 표정을 지었어.

1000624187.english: So much so that he looks like a completely different person...

1000624188.english: I must have seen it wrong. You're so kind.

1000624189.english: Sunny, your night vision isn't as good as mine, is it?

1000624190.english: Hmm... well, I guess it's just a pointless thought.

1000624191.english: Well then, let's keep searching the warehouse! I'm recharged with positive energy!
1000624191.korean: 그럼 계속 창고를 찾아보자! 긍정 에너지 충전 됐으니까!

1000624195.english: Yeah. I didn't know there would be that much inventory in the warehouse I found.
1000624195.korean: 응. 찾은 창고에 그렇게 물자가 많을 줄은 몰랐어.

1000624196.english: I just finished organizing the quantities and it's already dawn...

1000624197.english: I hope the leader isn't worried?

1000624199.english: Who looks like they're lying there...?

1000624204.english: I'm breathing! W-what on earth is going on...?
1000624204.korean: 숨은 쉬고 있어! 대, 대체 무슨 일이지...?

1000624205.english: I, I'll go see the leader!

1000624206.english: Please look after the other people's situations!

1000624212.english: Hehe... I'm glad I told them it was okay to come late...
1000624212.korean: 후후... 늦게 와도 된다고 말하길 잘했네요...

1000624217.english: Shamefully, in an instant... *chuckle*, I was subdued.

1000624220.english: It seems to be a brainwashing module.

1000624221.english: I'm barely resisting... but it will be soon.

1000624222.english: I, I'll take it off for you!

1000624225.english: It has already taken over the module. Even if you take off the earrings, it will only be a temporary measure.
1000624225.korean: 이미 모듈까지 잠식됐어요. 귀걸이를 뗀다해도 임시방편일 뿐일 거예요.

1000624226.english: And if Feather tears this off... it reveals the fact that there is someone who hasn't been brainwashed.
1000624226.korean: 그리고 페더가 이걸 떼어버리면... 세뇌당하지 않은 누군가가 있다는 사실을 알리게돼요.

1000624229.english: Do you remember... the port we used when we came to this island?
1000624229.korean: 우리가... 이 섬에 올때 썼던 항구, 기억하죠?

1000624230.english: Since there is a boat there...

1000624233.english: I will absolutely never leave the leader and the others behind...!
1000624233.korean: 절대로 리더랑 다른 분들을 두고 가진 않을 거예요...!

1000624235.english: Hehe... What a stubborn kid. I wonder who taught him that...
1000624235.korean: 후후... 정말 고집스러운 아이네요. 누가 가르친 건지...

1000624242.english: Walking through the forest, I couldn't say a word as I watched Snow Feather speak calmly, as if it were someone else's business.
1000624242.korean: - 숲을 걸으며 마치 다른 사람의 일처럼, 담담하게 이야기하는 스노우 페더를 보고 나는 아무 말도 할 수 없었다.

1000624243.english: Isn't that really stupid? Naively trusting someone I just met...
1000624243.korean: 정말 바보같죠? 순진하게 처음 본 사람을 믿어버리고...

1000624244.english: I did that to the people who saved me. With my own hands.
1000624244.korean: 저를 구해준 분들을 그렇게 만들었어요. 제 손으로요.

1000624245.english: ...The uncle told me that, too. But...

1000624247.english: Snow Feather, biting her lip to hold back tears, barely managed to open her mouth.
1000624247.korean: - 입술을 깨물며 눈물을 참던 스노우 페더가 간신히 입을 열었다.

1000624248.english: We can't just keep crying. Thanks to you, we were finally able to save the leader and the others.
1000624248.korean: 울고만 있을 수는 없겠죠. 인간님 덕분에 드디어 리더와 다른 분들을 구할 수 있게 됐으니까요.

1000624249.english: ...I'm almost there. I'll go take a look and be right back.

1000624250.english: A fedora sticking out of a tree was visible beside Snow Feather as she sped through the forest.
1000624250.korean: - 속도를 내 숲을 헤치고 나아가는 스노우 페더의 옆으로 나무에서 삐죽 튀어나온 중절모가 보였다.

1000624252.english: That makes sense, of course. After all, I've been watching for a long time.

1000624253.english: Still, I have a good feeling about this time!

1000624254.english: Based on my analysis, thanks to you, Human, the success rate has already surpassed 300%!
1000624254.korean: 제 분석 결과, 인간님 덕분에 성공확률은 이미 300%를 돌파했습죠!

1000624256.english: - When we looked where the Bloody Panther was pointing, a huge iron gate was visible through the lush trees.
1000624256.korean: - 블러디 팬서가 가리키는 곳을 보자, 무성한 나무 사이로 거대한 철문이 보였다.

1000624257.english: There was nothing around that iron gate.

1000624258.english: Snow Feather, Sunny, and Elven, who had gone ahead, headed toward the door after confirming that there were no traps.
1000624258.korean: - 선행한 스노우 페더와 써니, 엘븐이 함정이 없다는 것을 확인한 후에 문 앞으로 향했다.

1000624260.english: Wouldn't it be better for the commander to be outside?

1000624261.english: The enemy might be after it.
1000624261.korean: 적이 그걸 노리고 있을지도 모르지 말임다.

1000624262.english: It would be safer for you to stay with us than to risk being ambushed by dispersing your forces.
1000624262.korean: 전력을 분산시키면서 기습당할 위험을 감수하느니, 차라리 저희와 함께 계시는게 더 안전할검다.

1000624263.english: Besides, I don't know how spacious it is inside, but if it's a lab, there will probably be a lot of narrow passageways.
1000624263.korean: 거기다 안이 얼마나 넓은지는 모르겠지만 연구실이라면 좁은 통로가 많을거지 말임다.

1000624264.english: Isn't that place completely the stage for our Armored Maiden?
1000624264.korean: 그런곳은 완전히 저희 아머드 메이든의 무대이지 않슴까.

1000624265.english: Well then, it's decided. Let's go, guys!

1000624267.english: - The facility we finally entered was quiet.

1000624268.english: - But after a while, numerous AGS greeted us.
1000624268.korean: - 하지만 잠시 후, 수많은 AGS들이 우리를 맞이해주었다.

1000624272.english: Kali! Don't come out for no reason. Stay well hidden behind the captain!
1000624272.korean: 칼리! 괜히 나서지 말고 대장 뒤에 잘 숨어있어!

1000624274.english: - The enemy's numbers and firepower were strong, but as Bloody Panther said, the narrow passage was a blessing.
1000624274.korean: - 적의 수와 화력은 강력했지만, 블러디 팬서의 말대로 좁은 통로가 호재가 되었다.

1000624275.english: - We were able to continue advancing inward, using the firepower of the Armored Maidens and the sturdy Bloody Panthers at the forefront.
1000624275.korean: - 튼튼한 블러디 팬서를 앞세우고 아머드 메이든의 화력을 이용해 안으로 계속 전진할 수 있었다.

1000624276.english: - A corridor surrounding the commons. A massive core was visible through the glass on one wall.
1000624276.korean: - 공동을 감싼 복도. 한쪽 벽의 유리를 통해 거대한 코어가 보였다.

1000624278.english: You came here on your own accord...

1000624280.english: The answer to my long research...!

1000624281.english: You really talk a lot! I never dreamed you'd be this kind of guy...!
1000624281.korean: 정말 말이 많군요! 이런 녀석일줄은 꿈에도 몰랐습니다...!

1000624283.english: This is absolute madness... If the commander gets caught by something like that...
1000624283.korean: 엄청난 광기야... 저런 거한테, 사령관이 잡히면...

1000624284.english: - Harpyia, who had been guarding the rear, carefully took my hand.
1000624284.korean: - 후방을 경계하던 하르페이아가 내 손을 조심스럽게 잡았다.

1000624285.english: No matter how unique your taste is, you probably don't have a hobby that would be obsessed with something like that.
1000624285.korean: 아무리 주인님께서 취향이 독특하시다고 해도, 저런 것에게 붙잡히는 취미는 없으실테죠.

1000624286.english: And... we won't let that happen.
1000624286.korean: 그리고... 저희가 그렇게 되도록 두지 않을 겁니다.

1000624287.english: Yeah. If we get caught by something like that, whether it's the Commander or us, it won't end well.
1000624287.korean: 그래. 사령관이든 우리든 저런거에게 붙잡히면 좋게는 안 끝날거야.

1000624291.english: You, promise me. If it gets dangerous, you'll escape alone.
1000624291.korean: 당신, 나랑 약속해. 만약 위험해지면 혼자서라도 빠져나가기로.

1000624295.english: If anything happens, take your master and leave.
1000624295.korean: 만약 무슨 일이 생기면 주인님을 모시고 이탈하세요.

1000624297.english: Well, the master is directing it himself, so there's no way we'll lose, but I'll say it anyway.
1000624297.korean: 뭐, 주인님이 직접 지휘하시는데 우리가 질 리는 없지만 일단 말해두는 겁니다.

1000624299.english: Commander, we've reached a fork in the road!

1000624301.english: Wow... there really are so many...!

1000624303.english: We're almost there! Just past this hallway is the central control room!
1000624303.korean: 거의 다 왔습니다! 이 복도만 지나면 중앙제어실입니다!

1000624304.english: It's easier than you think! I was nervous for nothing.

1000624305.english: It'll take a while for the old man to get there and start hacking!
1000624305.korean: 도착해서 아저씨가 해킹을 하는데에도 시간이 걸릴 거예요!

1000624306.english: In the meantime, we have to stop the AGS!

1000624308.english: While hacking, without a single scratch on my beautiful body, ohh ...
1000624308.korean: 해킹을 하는 동안, 제 아름다운 몸에 흠집 하나 나지 않도로오오오옥?!

1000624309.english: - Alfred, who was running in front, suddenly stopped and hid behind the Bloody Panther.
1000624309.korean: - 앞장서서 달리던 알프레드가 급히 멈춰서더니 블러디 팬서의 뒤로 숨었다.

1000624313.english: Is this a Black Wyrm model?

1000624314.english: Commander, it would be better if you stayed a little further away.
1000624314.korean: 사령관님은 좀 멀찍히 떨어져 계시는 게 좋겠슴다.

1000624315.english: There is no need to do that.

1000624316.english: - Black Wyrm's voice stopped me as I slowly backed away.
1000624316.korean: - 천천히 뒷걸음질 치는 나를 블랙 웜의 목소리가 멈춰세웠다.

1000624317.english: - At the same time, AGS appeared from deep inside the passage.
1000624317.korean: - 그와 동시에 통로 깊숙한 곳에서 AGS들이 모습을 드러냈다.

1000624318.english: As expected, I didn't plan on stopping it alone...!
1000624318.korean: 역시 혼자서 막을 생각은 아니었지 말임다...!

1000624319.english: ...So you're finally trying to keep your promise, Feather.

1000624320.english: Just as the leader said... he is really stubborn.

1000624322.english: Black Wyrm continued speaking with a faint, barely visible smile.
1000624322.korean: - 블랙 웜은 보일듯 말듯한 희미한 미소를 지으며 말을 이어갔다.

1000624323.english: Due to the influence of the emotion control module installed in me, I have become less affected by brainwashing.
1000624323.korean: 저는 제게 설치된 감정 제어 모듈의 영향으로, 세뇌의 영향을 덜 받게 되었습니다.

1000624324.english: As a result... while blatant disobedience to orders is impossible, we have acquired a few ways to bypass them.
1000624324.korean: 그 결과... 대놓고 명령에 불복종하는 행위는 불가능하지만 그래도 몇 가지, 우회할 수 있는 방법을 갖게 되었습니다.

1000624325.english: Forgetting to lock the prison door by mistake, or slightly staggering the guard shift times...
1000624325.korean: 실수로 감옥 문을 잠그지 않거나, 경비 교대 시간을 약간 엇갈리게 하거나...

1000624326.english: Things like arriving before the other sisters and waiting to stop an intruder threatening the main body.
1000624326.korean: 다른 자매들 보다 먼저 도착해서, 본체를 위협하는 침입자를 막기 위해 기다리는 일 같은 것 말입니다.

1000624328.english: It was a slim chance... but you really did a great job, Feder.

1000624330.english: Since you have gone to such lengths for me, it is now my turn.
1000624330.korean: 당신이 이렇게까지 해주었으니, 이제는 제 차례입니다.

1000624331.english: Black Wyrm turned around and aimed at the AGSs blocking the path.
1000624331.korean: - 블랙 웜은 뒤로 돌아 길목을 막고 있는 AGS들을 겨눴다.

1000624333.english: If you give me a command, I can resist this AI that constantly issues orders to me, just once.
1000624333.korean: 인간님의 명령이 있다면 단 한 번, 제게 끊임없이 명령을 내리는 이 A.I.에게 저항할 수 있습니다.

1000624334.english: And then soon the emotion control module will lose function due to the load, and I will end up being completely brainwashed.
1000624334.korean: 그리고 나면 곧 감정 제어 모듈이 부하로 인해 기능을 상실하고, 저는 완전히 세뇌되어버리고 말겠죠.

1000624335.english: The Black Wyrm's weapon began to slowly charge.
1000624335.korean: - 블랙 웜의 무기가 서서히 충전되기 시작했다.

1000624336.english: Snow Feather bites her lip and stares at the Black Wyrm.
1000624336.korean: - 스노우 페더는 입술을 깨물고 그런 블랙 웜을 바라보고 있다.

1000624337.english: Snow Feather looked up at me with teary eyes and nodded slightly, and I made up my mind as well.
1000624337.korean: - 눈물 맺힌 눈으로 나를 올려다 본 스노우 페더가 살짝 고개를 끄덕이고, 나도 마음을 먹었다.

1000624338.english: Just as a faint smile flickered across Black Wyrm's lips, a tremendous heatwave soon engulfed the AGSs.
1000624338.korean: - 블랙 웜의 입가의 희미한 미소가 스치는가 싶더니, 곧 어마어마한 폭염이 AGS들을 덮쳤다.

1000624339.english: The AGS units blocking the path were instantly reduced to scrap metal by the intense heat and blast pressure.
1000624339.korean: - 앞길을 막고 있던 AGS들은 고열과 폭압에 순식간에 고철이 되었다.

1000624340.english: The Black Wyrm, which had been maintaining its firing for a while and cleaning up the AGS without leaving a single one behind, made a pained expression.
1000624340.korean: - 한동안 발사를 유지하며 AGS들을 남김없이 청소하던 블랙 웜이 고통스러운 표정을 지었다.

1000624342.english: The flames subsided, and only the wreckage of the AGSs remained in the passageway.
1000624342.korean: - 화염이 사그라들고 통로엔 AGS들의 잔해만이 남았다.

1000624343.english: Black Wyrm, who had been staggering for a moment and clutching his head, slowly raised his head.
1000624343.korean: - 잠시 비틀거리며 머리를 부여잡던 블랙 웜이 천천히 고개를 들었다.

1000624347.english: You must... deal with the intruder.

1000624350.english: Snow Feather and the crew hurriedly shielded me, but the explosion occurred in an unexpected place.
1000624350.korean: - 스노우 페더와 대원들이 급히 나를 감쌌지만 폭발은 엉뚱한 곳에서 일어났다.

1000624351.english: I'll take care of this! Please go!

1000624353.english: Sunny, who had rushed in instantly and turned the muzzle of Black Wyrm's gun, lowered his stance and created distance.
1000624353.korean: - 순식간에 달려든 뒤 블랙 웜의 총구를 돌린 써니가 자세를 낮추며 거리를 벌렸다.

1000624354.english: With my moves and the hologram, I should be able to buy enough time!
1000624354.korean: 제 몸놀림과 홀로그램이면 충분히 시간을 끌 수 있을거예요!

1000624356.english: As we went down the passageway, the sound of explosions grew louder and louder behind us.
1000624356.korean: - 통로를 내려가는 우리들 뒤로 점점 더 커지는 폭발음이 계속해서 들려왔다.

1000624357.english: - On the way to the central control room, leaving Sunny behind.
1000624357.korean: - 써니를 남겨두고 중앙 제어실로 향하는 길.

1000624358.english: Alfred seemed more anxious than before.
1000624358.korean: - 알프레드는 조금 전보다 더 다급해진 것 같았다.

1000624360.english: Just a little further and- Hiiiiiik!

1000624362.english: What a load of scrap metal...!

1000624363.english: Alfred swung his arm to smash the turret that suddenly popped out, then ran forward without looking back.
1000624363.korean: - 알프레드는 갑자기 튀어나온 터렛을 팔을 휘둘러 박살내곤 뒤도 돌아보지 않고 앞으로 달려나갔다.

1000624366.english: Having finally arrived at the central control room, Alfred approached the large control panel without even looking around.
1000624366.korean: - 마침내 도착한 중앙 제어실, 알프레드는 주위를 둘러보지도 않고 커다란 제어판 앞으로 다가섰다.

1000624367.english: Then, I will begin the hacking!

1000624368.english: It will take a while, so I'll leave the rest to you...!

1000624369.english: Snow Feather stood behind Alfred, who was staring intently at the control panel with a determined look on his face.
1000624369.korean: - 스노우 페더는 결연한 얼굴로 정신없이 제어판을 들여다 보는 알프레드의 뒤에 섰다.

1000624371.english: A massive number of AGSs stormed in front of us as we were taking defensive positions.
1000624371.korean: - 방어태세를 갖추는 우리의 앞으로 어마어마한 수의 AGS들이 들이닥쳤다.

1000624373.english: The fierce battle continued. It felt like several hours had passed, but not even 20 minutes had gone by.
1000624373.korean: - 치열한 전투가 이어졌다. 체감상으로는 몇 시간은 지난 것 같지만, 아직 20분도 채 지나지 않았다.

1000624374.english: Hey, bro! It's getting hard to hold out!

1000624376.english: I'm doing it...! Just a little more...!

1000624377.english: This thing has an unnecessarily complex internal structure!
1000624377.korean: 이 녀석은 쓸데없이 내부 구조가 복잡하단 말입니다!

1000624379.english: Haha, weren't you this guy a failure— Oops.
1000624379.korean: 하핫, 댁은 이 녀석 실패작 아니었- 어이쿠.

1000624383.english: As Geum-ran, who was blocking our path, drew her sword, an explosion occurred in the middle of the enemy AGSs.
1000624383.korean: - 우리 앞을 막아선 금란이 칼을 뽑는 것과 동시에 적 AGS들 한가운데서 폭발이 일어났다.

1000624385.english: Oh, thanks to you, I survived.

1000624387.english: With every swing of her sword as Geum-ran charged in again, the drive parts of the AGS units rushing at her like madmen were severed one by one.
1000624387.korean: - 다시 돌입한 금란이 환도를 한 번 휘두를 때마다 미친듯이 달려드는 AGS들의 구동부가 하나씩 잘려나갔다.

1000624388.english: Oh, you are truly beautiful...! Just like a single flower blooming on the battlefield!
1000624388.korean: 저, 정말 아름답군요...! 마치 전장에 피어난 한 떨기 꽃!

1000624390.english: Of course, we are continuing to hack! Please do not underestimate AI's multitasking capabilities!
1000624390.korean: 당연히 해킹은 계속 하고 있습니다! A.I.의 다중 작업 능력을 얕보지 말아주시지요!

1000624392.english: Now all I have to do is plant the code...!

1000624396.english: Ugh, I can't even last 10 seconds!

1000624399.english: - Panther dragged the hit Kalista to my side behind me.
1000624399.korean: - 팬서가 피탄당한 칼리스타를 후방에 있는 내 옆으로 끌고왔다.

1000624401.english: That's enough, so sit here and apply!

1000624404.english: The code has been uploaded! Now the villagers are free-
1000624404.korean: 코드가 업로드 됐습니다! 이제 마을 분들은 자유-

1000624405.english: Did you think you could stop me with just such a prank?
1000624405.korean: 고작 그런 장난으로 나를 막을 수 있을 줄 알았나?

1000624407.english: Calling it a failure? That is really rude!

1000624410.english: Now, I'll wipe out all the useless test subjects at once... all of them...!
1000624410.korean: 이제 쓸모없는 실험체들과 한번에... 모조리 쓸어버려 주마...!

1000624412.english: Weren't you trying to test this human here?!
1000624412.korean: 여기 이 인간님을 실험하려고 하는 것 아니었습니까?!

1000624413.english: You shouldn't just sweep it all away!

1000624414.english: Hehehe... I suppose that’s how it is for a failure like you...

1000624415.english: A single piece of flesh is enough for me...!

1000624419.english: - With Robert's words, the AGS began to attack more fiercely.
1000624419.korean: - 로버트의 말과 함께 AGS들은 더욱 거세게 공격해오기 시작했다.

1000624420.english: Ugh... I should have taken more time...!

1000624421.english: I don't know! The brainwashing has definitely been lifted, and according to what the Black Wyrm model said earlier, it was on its way here...!
1000624421.korean: 모르겠습니다! 분명 세뇌는 풀렸고, 아까 블랙 웜 모델의 말로는 이곳으로 오는 중이었을 텐데요...!

1000624422.english: - As soon as Alfred finished speaking, thorns grew from under the AGS's feet.
1000624422.korean: - 알프레드의 말이 끝나기가 무섭게 AGS들의 발밑에서 가시덩굴이 자라났다.

1000624423.english: - The fireball that followed destroyed the AGS that were tied up tightly.
1000624423.korean: - 꽁꽁 묶인 AGS들을 뒤이어 날아온 불덩이가 파괴했다.

1000624425.english: - Led by Cerestia and Black Wyrm, the Fairy Villagers each took up their weapons and began attacking the AGS.
1000624425.korean: - 세레스티아와 블랙 웜을 선두로, 요정 마을 주민들이 각자 무기를 들고 AGS들을 공격하기 시작했다.

1000624428.english: Hehehe. Should we talk about this a little later?

1000624429.english: Sunny is safe and will join us soon.

1000624430.english: ...Yes. From the time I was brainwashed until now... I remember everything.
1000624430.korean: ...네. 세뇌당했을 때부터 지금까지... 전부 기억하고 있어요.

1000624431.english: I'll thank you later. For now...

1000624432.english: - I looked at the core visible through the window at the same time as Cerestia.
1000624432.korean: - 세레스티아와 동시에 유리창 밖으로 보이는 코어를 바라보았다.

1000624433.english: Yes, don't worry about your back.

1000624434.english: - Even though the core was destroyed and the main body also suffered critical damage, Robert's functions did not stop.
1000624434.korean: - 코어를 파괴당하고, 본체 또한 치명적인 손상을 입었음에도 로버트의 기능은 정지되지 않았다.

1000624437.english: - I felt endless madness and obsession from Robert, who crawled toward me on the floor with his half-broken body.
1000624437.korean: - 반쯤 부서진 몸으로 바닥을 기어 내게 다가오려는 로버트에게선 끝없는 광기와 집념이 느껴졌다.

1000624438.english: If only you were here...! I give you orders...!

1000624441.english: - The eyes of the snow feather that stepped forward were burning coldly.
1000624441.korean: - 앞으로 나서는 스노우 페더의 눈이 차갑게 타오르고 있었다.

1000624443.english: - With a thud, Snow Feather's shuriken pierced the glove, and the seemingly endless light suddenly stopped.
1000624443.korean: - 퍼석, 하는 소리와 함께 스노우 페더의 수리검이 장갑을 꿰뚫자, 끝없이 이어질 것 같은 광소가 뚝 끊겼다.

1000624444.english: - Snow Feather, who had been looking down at Robert's remains for a moment, sank to the ground.
1000624444.korean: - 잠시 로버트의 잔해를 내려다보고 있던 스노우 페더가 스르르 바닥에 주저앉았다.

1000624446.english: - Vanilla, who read my intentions, stopped Snow Feather and handed me her gun.
1000624446.korean: - 내 뜻을 읽은 바닐라가 스노우 페더를 제지하고 자신의 총을 내게 건네주었다.

1000624448.english: - The armor, which was already damaged and cracked, was easily penetrated by rifle bullets.
1000624448.korean: - 이미 손상되어 균열이 생겨 있던 장갑은 소총탄에도 싱겁게 뚫렸다.

1000624449.english: - The seemingly endless light suddenly stopped, and Snow Feather slumped to the ground.
1000624449.korean: - 끝없이 이어질 것 같은 광소가 뚝 끊기고, 스노우 페더는 스르르 바닥에 주저앉았다.

1000624451.english: All the AGSs stopped on their own.

1000624453.english: Haha, it brings back old memories.

1000624454.english: - As Cerestia gestured, a halo of light appeared and penetrated Snow Feather.
1000624454.korean: - 세레스티아가 손짓하자 떠오른 빛무리가 스노우 페더에게 스며들었다.

1000624457.english: Thank you so much for saving us, for saving Feather and Sunny.
1000624457.korean: 저희를 구해주셔서, 페더와 써니를 구해주셔서... 정말로 감사드려요.

1000624458.english: I will definitely repay this favor, even if it means giving everything I have.
1000624458.korean: 이 은혜는 반드시, 제 모든 것을 바쳐서라도 갚을게요.

1000624459.english: Are you telling me to join?

1000624461.english: That won't be enough to repay our kindness, so please think of something else~?
1000624461.korean: 그걸로는 도저희 보은이 안되니까, 다른 것도 생각해 주세요~?

1000624463.english: - Cerestia approached me and hugged me.

1000624464.english: - A halo of light envelopes my body, along with a refreshing scent I've already smelled once.
1000624464.korean: - 이미 한 번 맡아본 청량한 향기와 함께 빛무리가 내 몸을 감싼다.

1000624465.english: There may be a side effect of feeling a little tired later on, but for now, you will feel energized.
1000624465.korean: 나중에 살짝 피곤해지는 부작용은 있지만, 일단 지금은 기운이 나실 거예요.

1000624466.english: Thank you for your hard work, Master.

1000624467.english: - Although there were minor wounds, all the soldiers who fought together appeared to be safe.
1000624467.korean: - 자잘한 상처는 있었지만 함께 싸웠던 대원들은 모두 무사해 보였다.

1000624468.english: - The moment I was about to take a step, I heard a familiar call.
1000624468.korean: - 걸음을 옮기려는 순간 익숙한 호출음이 들렸다.

1000624470.english: I guess everyone was very worried.

1000624471.english: - As Vanilla said, hundreds of communication requests came into my communicator in an instant.
1000624471.korean: - 바닐라의 말대로 내 통신기엔 순식간에 수백 개의 통신 요청이 들어왔다.

1000624473.english: - First, I chose one of them and told them that I and the other agents were safe, and left the research lab where the fierce battle had taken place.
1000624473.korean: - 우선 그 중 하나를 선택해서 나와 다른 대원들이 무사함을 전하며, 치열한 싸움이 벌어졌던 연구소를 뒤로했다.

1000624474.english: Continued from the epilogue of <Aria of the Fairy Village>.

1000624479.english: I finally got connected. What were you doing?
1000624479.korean: 이제야 연결됐군요. 뭘 하고 있었던 건가요?

1000624480.english: Oh, excuses aside. I guess I was just wasting my time on something useless again.
1000624480.korean: 아, 변명은 됐어요. 보나마나 또 쓸데없는 일에 시간을 낭비하고 있었겠죠.

1000624481.english: I have something to convey. Yes. What else could there be?
1000624481.korean: 전달할 일이 있어요. 네. 그거 말고 뭐가 있겠어요?

1000624483.english: I found something good. Well, to borrow that useless thing's words... the right answer, shall we say?
1000624483.korean: 좋은걸 찾았거든요. 음, 그 쓸모없는 것의 말을 빌리자면... 정답이라고 해야할까요?

1000624484.english: Well, it was a failure in my research and it was shattered horribly, but it didn't matter. I have plenty of long-term plans.
1000624484.korean: 뭐, 연구에도 실패한 주제에 꼴사납게 부서져버렸지만 상관없죠. 장기말은 얼마든지 있으니까.

1000624485.english: I'll be back soon, so let's call a meeting. Then...

1000624488.english: It was a man, I guess.

1000624489.english: Ugh... The place I was looking at was actually where I was working...
1000624489.korean: 으으... 봐뒀다는 곳이 내가 작업하던 곳이었다니...

1000624490.english: When will I move all this...

1000624491.english: Wouldn't it be nice if you did it right when you did it?
1000624491.korean: 그러게 할 때 제대로 딱 했으면 좋잖아?

1000624492.english: What can I say if you rest after doing what you're doing?
1000624492.korean: 할 거 하고 쉬면 내가 뭐라고 하디?

1000624493.english: Why are you suffering like this?

1000624495.english: What, you don't want to do it?

1000624496.english: Then I'll move it, so you go swimming while singing a military song-
1000624496.korean: 그럼 그건 내가 옮길테니까 너는 군가부르면서 수영-

1000624497.english: Oh, no! I'll do it right away!

1000624500.english: Can I be first place at this level?

1000624502.english: Practice more because there might be an ambush.
1000624502.korean: 복병이 있을 수도 있으니까 더 연습해.

1000624503.english: Um... but I'm hungry... can't I do this after eating?
1000624503.korean: 음... 근데 네리 배고픈데... 밥 먹고 하면 안 돼?

1000624504.english: Where do I have time for that-

1000624506.english: What are you moving? Can I help you?

1000624507.english: Ammunition and... oh! There's also combat rations!

1000624509.english: Yeah... If I eat it, I'll feel a little lighter...

1000624511.english: Okay, there's also Thetis and Impet.

1000624512.english: Thank you. I will enjoy it.

1000624514.english: Huh? Thetis, aren't you going to eat that biscuit?
1000624514.korean: 어? 테티스, 그 비스켓 안 먹어?

1000624516.english: Really? Then give it to me.

1000624517.english: I'm so hungry I could eat sand.
1000624517.korean: 엄청 배고파서 모래도 먹을 수 있을 것 같아.

1000624518.english: You're really diligent in swimming practice, aren't you? If you win first place and get a date, what are you going to do with the Commander?
1000624518.korean: 수영 연습 엄청 열심인데? 1등해서 데이트권 받으면 사령관님이랑 뭐 하려고?

1000624520.english: Wake up, eat breakfast, swim, eat lunch, swim, eat dinner, swim, and sleep!
1000624520.korean: 일어나서 아침 먹고 수영하고, 점심 먹고 수영하고, 저녁 먹고 수영하고 자는 거야!

1000624521.english: Are you really only going to swim? It's a waste!
1000624521.korean: 너 진짜 수영밖에 안 할거야? 아깝잖아!

1000624522.english: Yeah? Then what else do you do?
1000624522.korean: 응? 그럼 뭐 다른 거 해?

1000624523.english: Ah, I should eat something delicious one day. Something like barbecue.
1000624523.korean: 아, 하루 정도는 맛있는 거 해먹어야겠다. 바베큐 같은 거.

1000624524.english: I need to ask Fenrir to catch just one boar~
1000624524.korean: 펜리르한테 멧돼지 한 마리만 잡아달라고 해야지~

1000624525.english: Haha. Well, just playing around like that must be a refreshing experience for the Commander.
1000624525.korean: 하핫. 뭐, 그렇게 놀기만 하는 것도 사령관님한테는 신선한 경험이겠네.

1000624527.english: Of course! We're used to water, and we practice so hard?
1000624527.korean: 당연하지! 우리는 물에 익숙한 데다가 이렇게 열심히 연습하는걸?

1000624528.english: Oh, but... I saw Impet swimming earlier, and he was pretty good at it...
1000624528.korean: 아, 근데... 임펫도 아까 수영하는 거 보니까 잘하던데...

1000624529.english: Don't worry. I'm not strong enough to beat guys like you.
1000624529.korean: 걱정 마. 너희 같은 애들을 이길 정도는 아니니까.

1000624531.english: Huh? What kind of plan is it?

1000624533.english: Why is that? Do they perhaps not know much about this kind of thing?
1000624533.korean: 왜그러지? 혹시 이런 쪽은 잘 모르는 건가?

1000624534.english: Oh, no, that's not true. I know that kind of thing perfectly well, you know?
1000624534.korean: 아, 아니거든요? 저는 그런 것도 완전 잘 알거든요?

1000624535.english: If the chance arises, uh, anytime...

1000624536.english: Oho... then I'll tell you the plan in detail, so could you give me some advice, young lady?
1000624536.korean: 오호... 그럼 계획을 자세하게 들려줄 테니까, 아가씨가 좀 조언해줄래?

1000624537.english: Of course. I, I know that kind of thing well!
1000624537.korean: 얼마든지요. 저, 저는 그런 거 잘 아니까요!

1000624540.english: This is... well, I wouldn't go so far as to call it ordinary, but it's not that strange either, right?
1000624540.korean: 이정도는 뭐... 평범하다고 까지는 못하겠지만 그렇게 이상한 것도 아니라고?

1000624541.english: It's just a light change of pace.

1000624543.english: But those handcuffs don't look very sturdy.
1000624543.korean: 그런데 그 수갑, 별로 안 튼튼해 보이는데?

1000624544.english: The commander is strong, so he might let it go.

1000624545.english: Don't worry about that. We are doing everything with mutual consent.
1000624545.korean: 그건 걱정마. 다 동의하에 하는 거니까.

1000624551.english: There's more over there, so we just need to move that.
1000624551.korean: 저쪽에 더 있으니까 이제 그것만 옮기면 돼.

1000624552.english: Uh... I didn't hear you properly...?

1000624553.english: Huh? Is there anything else to move?

1000624554.english: Then I'll help you! You can't swim right after eating.
1000624554.korean: 그럼 내가 도와줄게! 밥 먹고 바로 수영하면 안되니까.

1000624557.english: Since it is an unsecured zone, let's move while in combat readiness.
1000624557.korean: 미확보 구역이니까 전투 태세 갖춰서 이동하자고.

1000624563.english: Did you come? The hologram projector?

1000624564.english: Hehe, the old man fixed it neatly.

1000624566.english: I've been charging your wing batteries too.

1000624569.english: I'm telling you, it'll be fine.

1000624572.english: He left first, saying he had something to prepare.

1000624573.english: Let's meet at the outskirts of the old city, where we always used to meet.
1000624573.korean: 항상 만나던 구 시가지 외곽에서 만나재.

1000624574.english: Well then, I should head out. I'll be ready right away.

1000624575.english: It's okay to take your time. It's still a while before sunset.
1000624575.korean: 천천히 해도 괜찮아. 해 질라면 멀었으니까.

1000624576.english: ...But, I can't believe a day like this has actually come.

1000624578.english: Since that day, I have been waiting only for the day to execute the plan to save everyone...
1000624578.korean: 그날 이후로 모두를 구하는 계획을 실행하는 날만 기다려 왔는데...

1000624580.english: You told me not to worry?

1000624582.english: Still, I keep thinking about everything that has happened so far.

1000624583.english: Oh, right. I remember starving for a week because I couldn't find food while hiding, and then meeting you again, sir.
1000624583.korean: 아, 그래. 숨어다니느라 음식을 못 구해서 일주일 동안 쫄쫄 굶다가 다시 아저씨 만난 거 기억난다.

1000624584.english: Haha, I was really surprised back then.

1000624585.english: So... I thought it was a really weird robot.

1000624586.english: ...It is true that it is strange, though.

1000624587.english: Still, if it weren't for you, we wouldn't have been able to hold out until now.
1000624587.korean: 그래도 아저씨가 아니었으면 우린 지금까지 버티지도 못했을 거야.

1000624588.english: But why is the man helping us?
1000624588.korean: 그런데 아저씨는 왜 우릴 도와주는 걸까?

1000624589.english: Whenever I ask, they always just laugh and change the subject.
1000624589.korean: 물어봐도 맨날 쿠후후...! 하고 웃으면서 말 돌리기나 하고.

1000624590.english: You took my hair on the day we first met...

1000624591.english: If the plan succeeds, let's ask again.

1000624592.english: The leader and Black Wyrm together.

1000624593.english: That would be great. Tie them up tight so they can't escape!
1000624593.korean: 그게 좋겠어. 도망 못치게 꽁꽁 묶어놓고!

1000624594.english: If you change the subject again, should I keep poking you with my finger until you answer?
1000624594.korean: 또 말 돌리시면 대답하실 때까지 손가락으로 콕콕 찔러볼까?

1000624596.english: Ahaha, just imagining it is fun.

1000624597.english: The leader has a bit of a playful side too, so he'll join in.
1000624597.korean: 리더도 은근히 장난기가 있으니까 같이 해줄거야.

1000624602.english: It's been so long since I've had a vacation...

1000624604.english: Did you come? Why did it take so long?

1000624605.english: What am I supposed to do if I meet the Commander? I should dress up nicely.
1000624605.korean: 사령관님 만나면 어떡해~ 예쁘게 꾸미고 나와야지.

1000624607.english: But the captain spent two hours preparing today, didn't he?
1000624607.korean: 그러는 대장도 오늘 두 시간 동안 준비했잖아?

1000624608.english: Weren't you secretly hoping for it?

1000624609.english: Is there anyone here who isn't like that?
1000624609.korean: 여기 애들 중에 안 그런 애가 있긴 해?

1000624610.english: Still, rather than seeking a huge, uncertain happiness, I should enjoy the small joys of the moment.
1000624610.korean: 그래도 불확실한 커다란 행복보단 당장의 소소한 행복을 좀 누려야지.

1000624613.english: I asked him to come out with me, but he said he doesn't want to. He says he just wants to stay in his room.
1000624613.korean: 같이 나오자고 했는데 싫대. 그냥 방에 있겠다는데?

1000624615.english: Hey, even so, are you just going to leave it behind?

1000624616.english: I, I struggled with him for over 30 minutes, too. What am I supposed to do when he's stuck in a corner and won't budge an inch?
1000624616.korean: 나, 나도 30분 넘게 실랑이했단말야. 구석에 박혀서 꿈쩍도 안하는 걸 어떡해.

1000624617.english: Haa... Alright. I'll go check it out later.

1000624619.english: Weren't you supposed to come out together? The Captain's room door was closed.
1000624619.korean: 같이 나온 거 아니었어? 대장네 방 문 닫혀있던데?

1000624620.english: I suggested going out, but he kept dawdling, so I left first.

1000624621.english: Well, he'll come on his own, so I'm going to take a nap.
1000624621.korean: 뭐, 그녀석은 알아서 올테니까 난 한숨 잔다.

1000624623.english: W-wow... but the captain's swimsuit... seeing him in it is totally shocking...
1000624623.korean: 우, 우와... 근데 대장 수영복... 입은 거 보니까 엄청 충격적이네...

1000624624.english: It took a lot of time to prepare.

1000624630.english: Why are you so late... huh...?

1000624634.english: Ah, no. It is a swimsuit.

1000624635.english: What do you mean it's not? I definitely saw it a few times while doing the laundry—
1000624635.korean: 아니긴 뭘 아냐. 세탁할때 분명히 몇 번 봤는-

1000624639.english: Why, why do you keep doing this? Is this the first time you've seen me in a swimsuit? Hmph.
1000624639.korean: 왜, 왜 자꾸 그러는거야? 수영복 입은 거 처음 봐? 흥.

1000624641.english: Hehe, I'm telling you, all of our squad members are exactly the same.
1000624641.korean: 히힛, 정말 우리 부대원들은 다 똑같다니까.

1000624642.english: Correct answer! I lost to the Captain so I couldn't get a swimsuit from Audrey, but I wanted to play with the Commander at the beach, so I just threw on something similar for now!
1000624642.korean: 정답! 대장한테 져서 오드리님에게 수영복을 못 받았는데, 해변에서 사령관님이랑 놀고 싶어서 일단 되는대로 비슷한 거 입고 나왔다!
