1000624644.english: That's the right answer. Here you go, prize.

1000624646.english: If you act so pathetic, it makes me feel sorry for you.
1000624646.korean: 네가 그렇게 불쌍한 짓을 하면 내가 미안해지잖냐.

1000624647.english: You should have won the game.

1000624649.english: The Captain is a balance-breaking character, you know!

1000624650.english: Yeah, well. Our Armored Maidens are all strong, too.
1000624650.korean: 그래, 뭐. 우리 아머드 메이든들이 하나같이 강하긴 하지.

1000624651.english: I am very proud to be a member of the unit.

1000624652.english: Still, we're slow, so we're hard to handle~

1000624653.english: Isn't it just because you got into a brawl with Captain Quick Carmelo?
1000624653.korean: 그냥 네가 퀵 카멜로 대장이랑 난투전을 벌여서 그런거 아냐?

1000624655.english: How can you be exactly the same even in the game?

1000624656.english: Take some cover. At least move to dodge.
1000624656.korean: 엄폐 좀 하라고. 움직여서 피하기라도 하든가.

1000624658.english: Hey, hey! Where are you going!

1000624659.english: I'm going over there to rest by myself!

1000624663.english: Let's go too. He'll fight alone again and lose his underwear.
1000624663.korean: 우리도 가자. 저거 또 혼자 싸우다 기껏 입은 속옷도 날려먹을라.

1000624666.english: Captain, what should we do? Should we go back there?
1000624666.korean: 대장, 어떻게 할까? 다시 아까 거기로 가?

1000624667.english: It's annoying, so let's just stay here.

1000624668.english: Ah, first, send a message to Io telling him to get out quickly and not be upset. And here's the location.
1000624668.korean: 아, 일단 이오한테 내가 궁상떨지말고 얼른 기어나오라고 했다고 메세지 보내놔. 여기 위치랑.

1000624669.english: Then I'll really sleep. Wake me up if anything happens.
1000624669.korean: 그럼 난 진짜 잔다. 무슨 일 있으면 깨우고.

1000624673.english: Don't you think we need more designers?
1000624673.korean: 디자이너가 더 필요한 것 같지 않아?

1000624674.english: There are so many of us, and Audrey alone is not enough.
1000624674.korean: 우리 머릿수가 몇 명인데, 오드리님 혼자서는 턱없이 부족하다고.

1000624675.english: I heard that the Commander is also looking into obtaining genetic seeds from time to time?
1000624675.korean: 듣기론 사령관님도 유전자 씨앗을 구하려고 틈틈이 알아보고 계신다던데?

1000624676.english: ...Really, what are those clothes? Everyone always brings gifts to Audrey.
1000624676.korean: ...진짜, 그깟 옷이 뭐라고 맨날 다들 오드리님한테 선물을 가져다주고 말이야.

1000624677.english: No, you were going to get it too...

1000624678.english: Me, I just wanted to wear a swimsuit and relax on the summer beach.
1000624678.korean: 나, 난 그냥 수영복을 입고 여름 해변에서 쉬고 싶었을 뿐이라고.

1000624679.english: Even if you dress up nicely, the commander probably won't care anyway...
1000624679.korean: 예쁘게 차려입어봤자 어차피 사령관은 별로 관심도 없을거고...

1000624680.english: Huh? What are you talking about?

1000624681.english: The Commander loves that kind of thing. He often tells me I'm pretty.
1000624681.korean: 사령관님이 그런 거 얼마나 좋아하는데. 예쁘다고도 자주 해주시는데?

1000624683.english: You could just say it's pretty and suits you well.
1000624683.korean: 그냥 말로만 예쁘다 잘어울린다 하는 걸수도 있잖아.

1000624684.english: Haha, I can definitely say that's not true!
1000624684.korean: 후후, 그건 아니라고 단언할 수 있지!

1000624685.english: According to our sources, the commander gets excited when he sees us wearing pretty clothes like these instead of our dull uniforms!
1000624685.korean: 정보통에 의하면, 사령관님은 칙칙한 군복 말고 이렇게 예쁜 옷을 입은 우리를 보면 두근두근 불끈불끈하신다고!

1000624686.english: What's the source? It's Talon Feather.

1000624687.english: And what the hell is that? What the hell are you filming?
1000624687.korean: 그리고 또 불끈불끈은 뭐야? 대체 뭘 찍고 다니는건데?

1000624688.english: No matter what, I can't show it to a strict girl like Carly~
1000624688.korean: 아무리 그래도 칼리같이 엄격한 애한테는 못 보여주지~

1000624689.korean: 뭐? 나도 알 거 다 안다고!

1000624691.english: You, don't you remember how much you nagged me when I tried to modify my combat suit?
1000624691.korean: 너, 내가 전투복 개조하려고 했을 때 엄청 잔소리한 거 기억 안 나?

1000624693.english: How is the military discipline, you're missing... The captain at least lets you go when he has to.
1000624693.korean: 군기가 어떻니, 빠졌다느니... 대장은 그래도 풀어줄 땐 풀어라도 주지.

1000624694.english: It's good to be responsible, but... isn't it just too boring?
1000624694.korean: 책임감 있는 건 좋은데 뭐랄까... 너무 재미없지 않아?

1000624696.english: I'll get promoted quickly that way. Captain Panther will soon be under my command.
1000624696.korean: 나는 그렇게 해서 빨리 진급할거니까. 팬서 대장도 곧 내 지시를 받게될거야.

1000624697.english: I don't think they'd promote someone who walks around in only their underwear...
1000624697.korean: 속옷만 입고 돌아다니는 대원을 진급시켜주시진 않을 것 같은데...

1000624699.english: Wouldn't you shamelessly bet your swimsuit on the captain who reserved it?
1000624699.korean: 수영복 예약받은 대장한테 뻔뻔하게 수영복 걸고 승부를 걸지 않나...

1000624700.english: The captain accepted it generously, but it ended up being a disaster...
1000624700.korean: 대장이 관대하게 받아줬는데 처참하게 지질 않나...

1000624701.english: Then this time, he insisted that the underwear was a swimsuit-

1000624702.english: Oh, I can't help it! I wanted to play with the Commander too!
1000624702.korean: 어, 어쩔 수 없잖아! 나도 사령관이랑 놀고 싶었다고!

1000624703.english: The swimming competition is hopeless, so this is the only way...!
1000624703.korean: 수영 대회는 가망이 없으니까 이런 방법밖엔...!

1000624706.english: I heard your love confession! This title is... good.
1000624706.korean: 사랑 고백 잘 들었습니다! 이거 제목은... 좋아.

1000624707.english: "Shock! Armored Maiden's K-unit is revealed to be in deep love with the Commander." This should do it.
1000624707.korean: "충격! 아머드 메이든의 K대원. 사령관을 열렬히 사모하는 것으로 밝혀져" 이거면 되겠다.

1000624708.english: You, you... are you recording now?

1000624709.english: It's been a while since we've had a scoop! It's not like I like the commander these days, but Kali—
1000624709.korean: 간만에 특종이구나! 요새 사령관을 좋아하는 건 별다른 이야깃거리도 안되지만 칼리-
